**We’re up against an extreme MAGA GOP majority in the House** — and they will stop at NOTHING to erase our historic achievements.

Peter Willis,

Over 68,000 Americans die EVERY YEAR because
they can't afford healthcare, and over half a million go bankrupt from
medical debt.

All of this pain is 100% avoidable, and now that Bernie Sanders is the
chair of the HELP committee, their deadly greed is about to be exposed.

Washington, and their top mission this year is to stop Bernie Sanders from
using his power to hold the healthcare industry accountable. Pitch in here
to have Bernie's back against lobbyist attacks!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

With your donation, we can help Bernie counter the full force of Big

| | Peter,

This is our last call for donations before our midnight deadline. We need to send a report to the DNC to let them know how many donors have pitched in to keep Georgia blue since we re-elected Rev. Warnock, and we need to give them the best number possible.

[_**Will you rush a donation right now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57374988/387718610/710125701?refcode=20230115.2_DPGFT_1P&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzQwYjMyZS0zMTk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W0_XIu75nQcv2B_yRRVm02Eew65hqVvqj8lo2EWQmYA=)

With Georgia under consideration to host the 2024 Democratic National Convention, we need to put our best foot forward. That’s why we’re coming to you right now.

We know that you helped us keep Georgia blue last year, and we hope you’ll help us out again ahead of this critical deadline.

[_**Can we count on you?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57374989/387718611/710125701?refcode=20230115.2_DPGFT_1P&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzQwYjMyZS0zMTk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W0_XIu75nQcv2B_yRRVm02Eew65hqVvqj8lo2EWQmYA=)

Briale Harris

Peter,

It's officially a new year, which as I'm sure you can guess, means a new set of goals for our team

2022 was an incredible success for our campaign, **but now begins the real work.**

**It 's time to address the _ skyrocketing inflation, the lawlessness across our communities, and the open border allowing unprecedented levels of danger to infiltrate our country._**

We know that, without a doubt, we can address these issues and reach common-sense conservative solutions, but to spread our conservative message and share our agenda, _**we need your help.**_

clean_body: Will you be there? | THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD Hi friends, As I start my term in the Senate, I am putting up a brand new donor wall to keep track of the loyal donors who have stuck with me to fight the radical Left's agenda. | As we launch this donor wall project, we are inviting you to become an early donor. If you chip in before midnight, your donation will have a 23X impact AND your name will be at the top of my wall. Do you want to add your name? Sincerely, Ted Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader from North Carolina. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: KatiePorter.com
subject: An update on our goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Katie’s running for the Senate, and we want you on our team!
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=15935%2E3422442%2EAT-PSZ)
Derek,
Yesterday, we announced our Senate campaign’s Launch Week Goal of 20,000 unique donations. Since then, nearly 8,000 grassroots donors stepped up to show their support for our campaign. **But with just over 48 hours left until our deadline, we need to close the gap:[Can you make your first $5 contribution before midnight on Tuesday?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15638?amount=5&refcode=EMAF15_3_GOA_20230115_V1_F&t=2&akid=15935%2E3422442%2EAT-PSZ)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Donate $15 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15639?refcode=EMAF15_3_GOA_20230115_V1_F-el&t=3&akid=15935%2E3422442%2EAT-PSZ) [Donate $22 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15640?refcode=EMAF15_3_GOA_20230115_V1_F-el&t=4&akid=15935%2E3422442%2EAT-PSZ) [Donate $50 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15641?refcode=EMAF15_3_GOA_20230115_V1_F-el&t=5&akid=15935%2E3422442%2EAT-PSZ) [Donate $100 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15642?refcode=EMAF15_3_GOA_20230115_V1_F-el&t=6&akid=15935%2E3422442%2EAT-PSZ) [Donate $250 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15643?refcode=EMAF15_3_GOA_20230115_V1_F-el&t=7&akid=15935%2E3422442%2EAT-PSZ) [Other amount ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15638?refcode=EMAF15_3_GOA_20230115_V1_F&t=8&akid=15935%2E3422442%2EAT-PSZ)
---
**Here’s why we set this goal, Derek:** Katie doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Banks, Big Pharma, or Big Oil. Unlike most campaigns, we truly rely on grassroots supporters like you.
So when we set a goal like this one—asking for a number of donations instead of a dollar amount—we are committing to being a people-funded campaign. Not one that is fueled by million-dollar donations funneled through shady super PACs, but a campaign that is powered by working people across the country.
**[Will you join our people-powered campaign by making your first $5 contribution today so we can meet our Launch Week Goal and show the strength of our movement?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15638?amount=5&refcode=EMAF15_3_GOA_20230115_V1_F&t=9&akid=15935%2E3422442%2EAT-PSZ)**
Thanks for your support,
Team Katie Porter

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=10&akid=15935%2E3422442%2EAT-PSZ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=15935%2E3422442%2EAT-PSZ)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

Friend,

body:
Will you support the DNC with a donation? | |
---
Derek -- I woke up this morning grateful. Grateful for this team, for the American people, and for the progress that we’ve made together. You’ve heard me say it before, but I’ll say it again now: _I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of our nation._ **I mean it.** Last November we secured our Senate majority and lost fewer seats in the House of Representatives than any Democratic President’s first midterm election in the last 40 years. And we had the best midterms for governors since 1986. Voters made clear that they wanted to elect leaders who would address the climate crisis, gun violence, and protect personal rights and freedoms. But we’re not done yet. We have a whole heck of a lot more to do to build a better America. **This team and the DNC have done a world of good to elect Democrats who are committed to making America work for everyone.** **[Will you chip in a few bucks -- or even $7 -- to the DNC? Whatever you can afford to give will go a long way in safeguarding our progress and electing more Democrats in the years to come.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wACnsPEIiRS7LuVBOIrplrAHg97kztwb4FNDbT87ndBwi5AAkPH5VD71HYHg2eYv6U0xHW4IbcSgWXFklaFkl65AxYSkWxBvTf72tRrEcZ8_px1qxNY6KqYIDxcj-shWxNMHNeJm_iLvA334cyq6vPieduWWSUAFe_DJWQ13Qg1G0qzF71T_ojY9-Pc3FhFe3KOwznilEbvOTIZ2BEZ8yKvTKeYN5oNQSHi_2bc5rNTDfeFeCBPNo7_Xj_6FBxXaRhyim2OJd9_qSlaRF2prhVT63Ui7rSG8wL18WICaEtBbWa59NM_n2zIQKEjpyBrnVFMX6-gBY6uU7JxKsdXLCWyYjQafPCZWumS43W_L1kLzz-DVEG7q93Vbrwj6o4aotud5MvGY9zTj9UrSoejqrk6kKrH4gx5LvCB1SFbTh-d7U_U-PHaNE9rnHKXJ98a3c/3sw/qAwp-ezrRK-E-e21i2QTRw/h0/ivNvb3cHMbOimVBC9v8T6Oogtonwyl5vnci5rTCL-Ic)**

clean_body: Will you support the DNC with a donation? | | Derek -- I woke up this morning grateful. Grateful for this team, for the American people, and for the progress that we’ve made together. You’ve heard me say it before, but I’ll say it again now: I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of our nation. I mean it. Last November we secured our Senate majority and lost fewer seats in the House of Representatives than any Democratic President’s first midterm election in the last 40 years. And we had the best midterms for governors since 1986. Voters made clear that they wanted to elect leaders who would address the climate crisis, gun violence, and protect personal rights and freedoms. But we’re not done yet. We have a whole heck of a lot more to do to build a better America. This team and the DNC have done a world of good to elect Democrats who are committed to making America work for everyone. We’ve got to keep up our work of electing Democrats at every level and building a better America -- and the DNC’s work is integral to it. I really appreciate your support, Derek. God love ya. body:
JAN 23RD • 6:30PM El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA We are very excited to have Dr. Douglas G Frank, Patriot Force, and E
| |
---
|
---
## JAN 23RD • 6:30PM El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
---
---
|
---
**We are very excited to have Dr. Douglas G Frank, Patriot Force, and Election Integrity Project ca will be with us. Don't miss this and make sure to bring your friends.**
Blessed and Free
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com
## Dr. Douglas G Frank
---
|
---
Dr. Douglas G Frank is a world-renowned physicist with sixty peer-reviewed scientific publications, including cover and feature articles in the world’s leading scientific journals. His Ph.D. is in surface-electroanalytical chemistry, which combines chemistry and physics techniques for the manipulation and analysis of molecules on surfaces. He left academics in 1996, and has since done extensive consulting, inventing, and technical manufacturing, building electron microscopes, laser scanners, and precision manufacturing and control devices.
He is internationally known for his contributions to the bowing sport and manufacturing industry and helped to establish a special school for extraordinarily gifted youngsters near Cincinnati, Ohio, where he served as the Math & Science department chair for twenty-five years.
Recently, Dr. Frank was featured in two of Mike Lindell’s documentaries, (“Scientific Proof” and “Absolute Interference”) because he discovered several of the algorithms being employed to manipulate our elections.
Since December of 2020, Dr. Frank has been working incessantly for election reform with grassroots teams in about forty states. He’s met in person with Secretaries of State, Attorney Generals, dozens of legislators, and hundreds of local election officials, and is widely known for his informative and engaging presentations.
|
---
---
|
---

name: ACTIVATE YOUR 2023 MEMBERSHIP
subject: 2023 Membership Status: INCOMPLETE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
---
It’s a new year, Fellow American - and though Joe Biden is still in the White House, things have definitely changed in Washington, D.C. - for the better.

With the 2022 Midterm Elections behind us and a new Republican Majority in the U.S. House, the real effort to STOP the radical Biden Democrats’ destruction of America’s freedoms and prosperity starts NOW.

Fresh from a victory which sent disastrous Democrat Speaker Nancy Pelosi packing, Republicans are ready to make a huge impact on Capitol Hill, Fellow American - with the numbers to block the Left’s destructive agenda from continuing unchecked, bring desperately needed oversight of the Biden Administration’s schemes, and set the stage for an even greater turnaround to come.

And it falls to us - our strongest supporters like YOU and everybody here at the Republican National Committee (RNC) working so hard to bring us through the darkness of the Biden Era - to slam the brakes on the Democrats’ radical plans in Washington AND prepare to elect a new Republican President to the White House and GOP majorities in both houses of Congress less than two years away. It’s a new year with new possibilities, Fellow American - but the same challenge as before: saving this great Republic from the Left’s radical plan to complete the Obama-Biden Democrats’ “fundamental transformation” of America.

And you know no one is doing more to lead this fight than the RNC, Fellow American.

But of course, everything we do begins with the rock-solid backing of our most committed supporters like YOU, and that’s why I’m asking you [**to renew your Sustaining Membership for 2023 TODAY.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a38bcbd54e7743f684b5f026bf52b9e0&_e=NuuHxyyPSxmeHVUU7m9zPFH8ETGf9Xb732nHS4QjpE4uUo1Ff4_BZ3QquIhQYIMGNi8YOq3S2Gpmu0FjySEHVzCT21pg2oPQdw6LQjqkjNiSGi-9VBbmapcuyNZCGLYdeCdKbpcifvRwZ_GTutMo5rRbCJFvJHmU_GqRPXL6ohdayr2lgwbKi7snNOurnP-pSBTI0GovcVeZEGlC8trqIco4JSm0L1jnrrC9gDbsneFkCYXt21CCv-1A-_AQ7A0OW6w2VdsOC9llF_1ym7KBhIFvjNO7xj4osYk1RORCecMaTd8JUMf-wl7eKZn75KCe71zVoTh4byTQgzJCFkRr1z0Sj3Ogecx6PGL9W0_UR8xVCnEMXWIUqAT9sxPJ1LSUVZWIJiQ6ZImt_Q4QooLsEER8fIY15A-Jucvs6udq6hFJl6SxB6nF_4xTI72SERAyWFE8Ae0etcqsBr_RSVj_vhd021JmJO4cuEcci5lJJq8%3D)

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a38bcbd54e7743f684b5f026bf52b9e0&_e=NuuHxyyPSxmeHVUU7m9zPFH8ETGf9Xb732nHS4QjpE4uUo1Ff4_BZ3QquIhQYIMGNi8YOq3S2Gpmu0FjySEHVzCT21pg2oPQdw6LQjqkjNiSGi-9VBbmapcuyNZCGLYdeCdKbpcifvRwZ_GTutMo5rRbCJFvJHmU_GqRPXL6ohdayr2lgwbKi7snNOurnP-pSBTI0GovcVeZEGlC8trqIco4JSm0L1jnrrC9gDbsneFkCYXt21CCv-1A-_AQ7A0OW6w2VdsOC9llF_1ym7KBhIFvjNO7xj4osYk1RORCecMaTd8JUMf-wl7eKZn75KCecR_X1mw-Vd_TcahFO4hPD95JRnwk5pOLDG9KF_P3p023_jpgYevnr3L6Jh4C-wB7w1IoWoVn9UEBXsiJiJTS0GVpDY54qWsj-UeXqPLKzeQi59HWzubeO20MLBxXKa-fhGIMOE8eKWfSQ8zHHH8E682LohPzyTkkuWBi8s2sIxY%3D)
Fellow American, the litany of abuses foisted on the American people by Joe Biden and the Democrats was bad enough in their first year of complete control in Washington - and it didn’t get any better in the second.

They began with an unprecedented spending spree which showered leftist constituencies with trillions of your tax dollars in wasteful spending - pushing our national debt above $30 trillion and hammering Americans with decades-high inflation.

They reversed every sensible measure the previous administration put in place to stem the tide of illegals invading our country - which has become worse than ever - and did exactly the wrong things on energy, the Second Amendment, public safety, Covid, and foreign policy, all the while dividing us with identity politics pandering and disrespect for our history and traditions.

Enough is enough, Fellow American, and we’re applying every lesson we’ve learned to empower Republican leaders at all levels nationwide to hold the line on Capitol Hill and across the nation while we set the stage for overwhelming GOP victories in 2024.

[**Fellow American, in order to do all this - get us back on course to make this great country greater than ever - we need YOU to renew your 2023 Sustaining Membership RIGHT NOW!**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a38bcbd54e7743f684b5f026bf52b9e0&_e=NuuHxyyPSxmeHVUU7m9zPFH8ETGf9Xb732nHS4QjpE4uUo1Ff4_BZ3QquIhQYIMGNi8YOq3S2Gpmu0FjySEHVzCT21pg2oPQdw6LQjqkjNiSGi-9VBbmapcuyNZCGLYdeCdKbpcifvRwZ_GTutMo5rRbCJFvJHmU_GqRPXL6ohdayr2lgwbKi7snNOurnP-pSBTI0GovcVeZEGlC8trqIco4JSm0L1jnrrC9gDbsneFkCYXt21CCv-1A-_AQ7A0OW6w2VdsOC9llF_1ym7KBhIFvjNO7xj4osYk1RORCecMaTd8JUMf-wl7eKZn75KCewrwHYDwuSsPv6sxEwE2UxzKf-yE4tswoyO0H-OD-JP-41XfN0YgIIFSpmxjN0TSbrUEdwD_IFRaV6mlEeLIZ6I8eiY2Up-xyJn7AcX22N68lUQLa5rdxRzqsyTtV5qAy5dEBK_h3WG1GWIC5OnnsrZ0dzod4Y3BlfCTqpM7UmOY%3D)

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a38bcbd54e7743f684b5f026bf52b9e0&_e=NuuHxyyPSxmeHVUU7m9zPFH8ETGf9Xb732nHS4QjpE4uUo1Ff4_BZ3QquIhQYIMGNi8YOq3S2Gpmu0FjySEHVzCT21pg2oPQdw6LQjqkjNiSGi-9VBbmapcuyNZCGLYdeCdKbpcifvRwZ_GTutMo5rRbCJFvJHmU_GqRPXL6ohdayr2lgwbKi7snNOurnP-pSBTI0GovcVeZEGlC8trqIco4JSm0L1jnrrC9gDbsneFkCYXt21CCv-1A-_AQ7A0OW6w2VdsOC9llF_1ym7KBhIFvjNO7xj4osYk1RORCecMaTd8JUMf-wl7eKZn75KCeGCy-__QQCtbjluc0ItC0Rvlzi4OriyvXxeopocjNobWyMxST5Ls18b6rLCicWoTu8Kkika3WiDA-oQ1F2e_I61cSoNtdn8oD-sybTws47UTW8DWiO2zY5SWTdQMvhYN0V7g6zrev_oeeVy7-K9fPBA1g8DnqJNk52f5M7qWQNRI%3D)
There’s nobody you can support that will do more than your Republican National Committee to derail the Democrats in the next two years - and we need you to step forward immediately.

Fellow American, will you please continue to back our indispensable efforts to support our GOP leaders and prepare for a winning future by renewing your 2023 Membership with the RNC now?

[**Thank you for all you do, Fellow American - we’re counting on you - please let me hear from you today!**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a38bcbd54e7743f684b5f026bf52b9e0&_e=NuuHxyyPSxmeHVUU7m9zPFH8ETGf9Xb732nHS4QjpE4uUo1Ff4_BZ3QquIhQYIMGNi8YOq3S2Gpmu0FjySEHVzCT21pg2oPQdw6LQjqkjNiSGi-9VBbmapcuyNZCGLYdeCdKbpcifvRwZ_GTutMo5rRbCJFvJHmU_GqRPXL6ohdayr2lgwbKi7snNOurnP-pSBTI0GovcVeZEGlC8trqIco4JSm0L1jnrrC9gDbsneFkCYXt21CCv-1A-_AQ7A0OW6w2VdsOC9llF_1ym7KBhIFvjNO7xj4osYk1RORCecMaTd8JUMf-wl7eKZn75KCe1v3ZKcjUpX_F2cpuJvaRkKlx6ex4c_hLkRaG1uF7kkRc7d-GunlCY4a90n4eH9E-jkMLwfAaqix-6LgI_eAu6g3dlWkIyT3dU_1GXIjSbYGZtB2M_yzBuoFWZUEtCUNSojWZ6Du9m6d1iWG841ro6Wb3fGBq5BrUe0LTBELLq4w%3D)

Sincerely,

RNC HQ

With the 2022 Midterm Elections behind us and a new Republican Majority in the U.S. House, the real effort to STOP the radical Biden Democrats’ destruction of America’s freedoms and prosperity starts NOW. Fresh from a victory which sent disastrous Democrat Speaker Nancy Pelosi packing, Republicans are ready to make a huge impact on Capitol Hill, Fellow American - with the numbers to block the Left’s destructive agenda from continuing unchecked, bring desperately needed oversight of the Biden Administration’s schemes, and set the stage for an even greater turnaround to come. And it falls to us - our strongest supporters like YOU and everybody here at the Republican National Committee (RNC) working so hard to bring us through the darkness of the Biden Era - to slam the brakes on the Democrats’ radical plans in Washington AND prepare to elect a new Republican President to the White House and GOP majorities in both houses of Congress less than two years away. It’s a new year with new possibilities, Fellow American - but the same challenge as before: saving this great Republic from the Left’s radical plan to complete the Obama-Biden Democrats’ “fundamental transformation” of America. And you know no one is doing more to lead this fight than the RNC, Fellow American. But of course, everything we do begins with the rock-solid backing of our most committed supporters like YOU, and that’s why I’m asking you Fellow American, the litany of abuses foisted on the American people by Joe Biden and the Democrats was bad enough in their first year of complete control in Washington - and it didn’t get any better in the second. They began with an unprecedented spending spree which showered leftist constituencies with trillions of your tax dollars in wasteful spending - pushing our national debt above $30 trillion and hammering Americans with decades-high inflation. They reversed every sensible measure the previous administration put in place to stem the tide of illegals invading our country - which has become worse than ever - and did exactly the wrong things on energy, the Second Amendment, public safety, Covid, and foreign policy, all the while dividing us with identity politics pandering and disrespect for our history and traditions. Enough is enough, Fellow American, and we’re applying every lesson we’ve learned to empower Republican leaders at all levels nationwide to hold the line on Capitol Hill and across the nation while we set the stage for overwhelming GOP victories in 2024. There’s nobody you can support that will do more than your Republican National Committee to derail the Democrats in the next two years - and we need you to step forward immediately. [**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e6cf4b78b4d4fd4bd5597b71905da0b&_e=yeVyPvf7Fkcbv9H48BJrlITtEigTUpopH1gI2iv5okAnBz1Myxt4LMP_7ksDtnWecJ5IV-lm7Ht0t-KlJ4ILC3eE9mZjWZh2jlVEg5csXfqc9JvmpPKoszf2w24d7dlH1QJESdpV6KA5Wz7F8wbBCKoZvq-5Rohr0TDUJIgVclu5hxwoqlUc0C_zUnrzsS9HfRyqVKz4wSujvO3a94iJ_TlxFoaUHvBGjQtTtxwoqtxbBR_A_RvKiiI56PfsZ5FyIof0ybCmQe-DmnGzjF-F0Q9fjiyG5tkSR4yYY_dqeVwAyOizPm0OApv84R6eRQHSSY4wTrHevlNDZ75kvaRXZQ%3D%3D) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can 't help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who've been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang ...while hoping that the guards wouldn't show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they're being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn't even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he's been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven 't held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e6cf4b78b4d4fd4bd5597b71905da0b&_e=yeVyPvf7Fkcbv9H48BJrlITtEigTUpopH1gI2iv5okAnBz1Myxt4LMP_7ksDtnWecJ5IV-lm7Ht0t-KlJ4ILC3eE9mZjWZh2jlVEg5csXfqc9JvmpPKoszf2w24d7dlH1QJESdpV6KA5Wz7F8wbBCKoZvq-5Rohr0TDUJIgVclu5hxwoqlUc0C_zUnrzsS9H8yCKIL4kOqEMoFwPNbTLfoUuLLQxSe3C6XEAl3ZI4k6sjgDSATDOPLPj1OsHIu34W7Wa4bv_hBoEQ03vTljllCYlaMjPBV2Hxpb9Paf6-pBxuWWsTXzkEH6XdG7ISpfcfzZBuqbPQLK0v-qlgsNXBA%3D%3D)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e6cf4b78b4d4fd4bd5597b71905da0b&_e=yeVyPvf7Fkcbv9H48BJrlITtEigTUpopH1gI2iv5okAnBz1Myxt4LMP_7ksDtnWecJ5IV-lm7Ht0t-KlJ4ILC3eE9mZjWZh2jlVEg5csXfqc9JvmpPKoszf2w24d7dlH1QJESdpV6KA5Wz7F8wbBCKoZvq-5Rohr0TDUJIgVclu5hxwoqlUc0C_zUnrzsS9HoQMREaru3hluCAAtbPVJfnk2J5a8hTqoGMchZ-Zea-HzfZLcfX67zoYx-8VGUDehSp0l6Z6aszsSyFihF69oDqwf0rKjWWq0JiR-RitzqkhZ8ZdmgMAuxbrNnSOFgeMOHkUQrrGqfIe5pRyfptLkaA%3D%3D)

name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: Press Release Eliminate Drop Boxes House Bill 1693
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
|
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
January 16 th, 2023

McGuire Introduces Legislation to Secure Elections RICHMOND, VA - Delegate John McGuire has introduced HB 1693 to protect election integrity, by abolishing drop boxes in Virginia. Absentee ballot boxes were implemented, due to the pandemic, and in some instances may lack a foolproof chain of custody. Drop boxes are no longer needed as the COVID lockdowns are over. "It's important that every legal vote is counted in a free and fair election, and as of late, the relaxed voting laws in Virginia and across the nation have eroded a lot of the confidence people have in our election process. We will have to do far more to make everyone confident in their elections again, but removing these boxes, where many people have seen problems in chain of custody, will be a great the first step." - Delegate John McGuire, Candidate for Virginia Senate District 10.
"The shut down of covid has passed and the lack of use of Drop Boxes does not warrant the cost" - Clara Belle Wheeler Former Vice Chair Virginia State Electoral Board
You can find the legislation online and read the resolution text [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QdVM5w-MZDj6NBChiEsPKGVJgFX3HlbtPxqNMnVZrr7AVJJC1d-ul2QzHbnM6B-YuSs2Z1NYi92SeuHQzs70cada83Ci-I83_tp3B2AQGXj_JG_5ZdgInT7YYmGOgDew2PR7Rr1ImbGhVrZtCJItBxRA3p3uWkIu7E4wFJIkxbrzPgSscQ-uGp__Md3kDUIDO88V8Vat74U=&c=MZeAbjWNZAQYtZWccN6Cn0i7HNV9p5zU2Hz4QrhUJ3A2cZLNBFClig==&ch=755Y76K9rWmEQVDCFDLEBKjDSod9DWOI90lvayEzI0-KlUF6WeIZXg==). ### Contact: [Press@mcguireforvirginia.com](mailto:Press@mcguireforvirginia.com)

name: The Ohio Democrats
subject: Carrying on Martin Luther King Jr.’s legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57384028/387760678/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDhiMTMxYy1hNjk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8UeiuSqsNoft3HnivUOgT2VeGm2LtxCUUuWcJ6NYxzs=) | Good morning.

Today, we honor Dr. Martin Luther King Jr, a man who gave his entire life to the fight for racial equality, advocating for voting rights, economic justice, education equity, and the livelihoods of Black Americans. And he was killed for it.

The right to vote is one of the fundamental rights guaranteed by our Constitution — _it is the foundation of our democracy._

Yet, Republicans in Ohio and across the nation continue trying to disenfranchise more people from participating in our democratic process.

Earlier this month, Governor Mike DeWine signed one of the _worst_ anti-voter bills into law — adding more unnecessary voting barriers for Ohioans. It’s another blatant attempt by the Ohio GOP to return to the days of Jim Crow and suppress voter turnout.

**The Ohio Democrats are committed to carrying on Dr. King’s legacy — not just with words — but with action.**

We stand with Ohio leaders who consistently fight for voting rights and are ready to protect the right to vote.

In solidarity,

The Ohio Democrats

Suite 101
Columbus, Ohio 43215

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: MLK DAY: Fighting for Justice in Philadelphia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly
body:
## As we celebrate Dr. King's Birthday across the nation, this is the quote that resonates most deeply with me.
## [](https://act.myngp.com/el/8kB_8EZuO7oQYkhlP7YyP_uxTRt-bKpKaZ3f5N5WgIc=/asOokzMHY8Raco4dttfW9O3-mGpcFlo7L20TvwpzinU=)
Six decades later, Dr. King's words still ring true for us in Philadelphia.
Black Philadelphians died four times more from Covid-19 than others,
**brings home this truth**.
Black women die three times more than other women,
**brings home this truth**.
Children in Philadelphia have their neural development disrupted because of crumbling lead paint from the walls,
**brings home this truth**.
We send our students and teachers to learn in building with asbestos poisoning them**,**
**brings home this truth.**
The rates of asthma in children are high due to air pollution in Philadelphia,
**brings home this truth.**
Philadelphians are deeply traumatized by the constant gun violence,
**brings home this truth.**
Every year on this day is a reminder to recommit myself to honor the memory of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. by working to dismantle the health inequities that deeply damage us.
We will work together to make Philadelphia a healthier and stronger city!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/8kB_8EZuO7oQYkhlP7YyP_uxTRt-bKpKaZ3f5N5WgIc=/xea3izq7PV-bDCgr_aCEFSXzvrF77p3NFfoAQRNtl_U=)

For more information about Nina's campaign, Please visit: [www.Ninaforphilly.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/8kB_8EZuO7oQYkhlP7YyP_uxTRt-bKpKaZ3f5N5WgIc=/4jaq0JRNBnk4qJBbfUoEl2WpGHwomRQeR20TMUIqgos=)

Paid for by Nina for Philly

name: Team Becca
subject: “dangerous unselfishness.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. asked all of us to adopt “dangerous unselfishness.” Here’s what that means: | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57386206/387769260/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTM1N2I3Ni1hOTk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fqLotgrO-pK5kdlWszuFktpp_jQQFzmKkI3WGadekc0=&emci=b948e6b3-b692-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=b5357b76-a995-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) | Peter, Today is Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. Day – a day to reflect on the life and legacy of Dr. King. During the final speech Dr. King gave the day before his assassination in Memphis, he asked his allies and supporters to adopt a mindset of “dangerous unselfishness.” To me, what this means is that in the fight for progress, we must put the needs of others above our own fears, be courageous and empathetic in our daily interactions, and keep our sights set on battling injustice in all of its forms – whether or not we are personally impacted by those injustices. **Like King, we must engage in meaningful conversations with our neighbors and friends about racial injustice. In a state like Vermont that is overwhelmingly white, it is particularly important that we have uncomfortable conversations, hold our friends and acquaintances accountable for their behavior and impact, and speak out in our communities about the injustices we see. ** Our words are important. Our actions, both large and small, will always be important. _You_ are important. And Dr. King’s teaching tells us that we all have a role to play in the pursuit of justice. Take a moment to reflect on how you can use your privilege to speak up about injustice in your community today. And before you go, please take a moment to watch Dr. King’s final speech “I’ve been to the mountaintop” **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57386207/387769261/-803653937?v=zgVrlx68v-0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTM1N2I3Ni1hOTk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fqLotgrO-pK5kdlWszuFktpp_jQQFzmKkI3WGadekc0=&emci=b948e6b3-b692-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=b5357b76-a995-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=43402272)** – it’s one of the most powerful speeches ever given. Yours in progress, Rep. Becca Balint

clean_body: Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. asked all of us to adopt “dangerous unselfishness.” Here’s what that means: | | Peter, Today is Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. Day – a day to reflect on the life and legacy of Dr. King. During the final speech Dr. King gave the day before his assassination in Memphis, he asked his allies and supporters to adopt a mindset of “dangerous unselfishness.” To me, what this means is that in the fight for progress, we must put the needs of others above our own fears, be courageous and empathetic in our daily interactions, and keep our sights set on battling injustice in all of its forms – whether or not we are personally impacted by those injustices. Like King, we must engage in meaningful conversations with our neighbors and friends about racial injustice. In a state like Vermont that is overwhelmingly white, it is particularly important that we have uncomfortable conversations, hold our friends and acquaintances accountable for their behavior and impact, and speak out in our communities about the injustices we see. Our words are important. Our actions, both large and small, will always be important. You are important. And Dr. King’s teaching tells us that we all have a role to play in the pursuit of justice. Take a moment to reflect on how you can use your privilege to speak up about injustice in your community today. And before you go, please take a moment to watch Dr. King’s final speech “I’ve been to the mountaintop” – it’s one of the most powerful speeches ever given. Yours in progress, Rep. Becca Balint Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room. As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. Now, she's making history as the first woman and openly LGBTQ person to ever serve Vermont in Congress. name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Honoring the life of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
Dear Derek,

Today we celebrate the life and legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.

Dr. King dedicated his life to the nonviolent struggle for civil rights in our country and around the world. His work serves as an example of what is possible when we come together to fight for a better future.

May Dr. King’s legacy inspire us to do all things through love and light, and to never give up on the fight for freedom. A fight that continues.

In the words of Coretta Scott King, “Let this holiday be a day of reflection, a day of teaching nonviolent philosophy and strategy, a day of getting involved in nonviolent action for social and economic progress.”

For country,

Chris

----------
[https://www.facebook.com/ChrisforPA]
[https://twitter.com/ChrisForPA]
[https://chrisforpa.com]

Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
Chris Deluzio for Congress

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Dangerous bail reform
body:
Friends,

On the campaign trail, I promised to reverse the dangerous bail reform policies that put our communities at risk.

I am proud to help advance legislation crafted by my colleague Elise Stefanik to counteract New York's failed bail reform laws.

STAND WITH US → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=first+button&utm_campaign=Dangerous+Bail+Reform+Email]

The New York State bail reform laws implemented in 2020 strip judges of discretion when setting bail and other pretrial release arrangements for those facing many misdemeanor and felony charges -- the SERVE Our Communities Act seeks to change that.

As my seat continues to be highly targeted, I'll fight harder to earn more support from those in my district. I need your help to do that!

Help me hold this seat by chipping in $25, $50 or ANY AMOUNT. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Dangerous+Bail+Reform+Email]

Anthony

Good day fellow patriot!

Are you in need of a reliable, high-quality flashlight for all of your outdoor adventures and emergencies?

Look no further!

Our Ultra Bright 800 Lumen LED Military-Grade Aluminum Flashlight is the perfect solution!

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Honoring Dr. King’s legacy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57388481/387779433/823540626?refcode=ea.f7d2b67b-ae95-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ms=ea.f7d2b67b-ae95-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2QyYjY3Yi1hZTk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yJ10hFBftDWmBQ2n38T9r2g4YZy_WKG5KWJpJcAew-U=&emci=7438f9ea-9693-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=f7d2b67b-ae95-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)
Peter, In March 1965, in Montgomery, Alabama, Dr. King told marchers, “We must come to see that the end we seek is a society at peace with itself, a society that can live with its conscience.” Nearly 60 years later, Dr. King’s words guide us as we continue to work toward that goal. A society that’s at peace with itself and can live with its conscience. We’re not there yet. **Peter, to reach that goal, I believe we must embrace our diversity where we strive to make sure there is equal opportunity for all. When we embrace our diversity – the best of each of us can shine through.** We’re taking steps to fulfill this promise. We’re focused on dismantling systemic racism, eliminating long-term inequities here in North Carolina, addressing disparities in criminal justice, and advancing environmental justice. A critical issue that we face — a matter of conscience — is increasing access to health care. Failure to expand Medicaid is costing lives and $521 million a month. It’s time for us to close the coverage gap, and I believe we’re closer than ever. We’re making once-in-a-generation investments in critical infrastructure that will allow communities and the economy to grow and thrive. Ensuring people have safe and clean drinking water. Expanding access to high-speed internet. Ensuring that every child has a sound basic education like our North Carolina Constitution requires. This is working toward the society that we seek. We are making progress, but it’s on all of us to continue this work, Peter. Together, we can enhance North Carolina’s reputation as a welcoming place where diversity, equality, acceptance and understanding are found in every corner. With gratitude, Roy
* * *
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57388482/387779438/2039383177?refcode=ea.f7d2b67b-ae95-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ms=ea.f7d2b67b-ae95-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2QyYjY3Yi1hZTk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yJ10hFBftDWmBQ2n38T9r2g4YZy_WKG5KWJpJcAew-U=&emci=7438f9ea-9693-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=f7d2b67b-ae95-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1049176) Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
United States | Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina

name: NextGen America
subject: Take action this MLK Day
body:
| | Friend, **Today, we’re honoring the life and legacy of Martin Luther King Jr.** A fierce advocate for civil rights and racial justice that moved our country toward a stronger and more representative democracy, Martin Luther King Jr. is an inspiration to all of us here at NextGen America. Martin Luther King Jr. was a leader for progress that reached all Americans, and it’s up to young people to continue his work. **[Help us secure a democracy that represents all of us by signing a petition, making a call, or sending a letter on an array of issues with our action hub.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57388735/387780161/435374414?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGQyYjY3Yi1hZTk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ExZTWARLcsQOpMuauuGsUxSyLY2ywAJ5-t8uX7PLHcc=&emci=3b51dc2e-4190-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=ddd2b67b-ae95-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=6787172) ** At NextGen, we celebrate Martin Luther King Jr. **not just today, but every single** **day** as we move our country toward lasting change. **We hope you’ll join us.** | [Take action](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57388744/387780172/167129937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGQyYjY3Yi1hZTk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ExZTWARLcsQOpMuauuGsUxSyLY2ywAJ5-t8uX7PLHcc=&emci=3b51dc2e-4190-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=ddd2b67b-ae95-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")

name: Autry Pruitt
subject: Would the Democrats cancel MLK?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC
body:
If MLK made his "I Have a Dream" speech in today's climate, he'd be canceled by the Left.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62211284:6cjupKGNr:m:1:3334294963:4824B4A169D61A06D24C9812CD8D0593:r "Dr. Martin Luther King Jr") Peter: _" I have a dream that my four little children will one day live in a nation where they will not be judged by the color of their skin but by the content of their character."_ Many Democrats will post this famous quote from Dr. Martin Luther King Jr, on their social media commemorating his historic speech. But their actions demonstrate it's just a veneer, hiding the true racism of the Democrats against Black people. Just look at how they've treated Rep. Byron Donalds. They don't care that he pulled himself out of poverty and became a sitting Congressman. Nope, to these Democrats, he's a traitor to his race because he's a conservative Republican. **[Let me tell you, it's time to embrace Dr. King's dream, but that won't happen if we allow the Democrat Party to divide Americans based on their differences instead of judging people on the content of their character. Donate $25, $50, or $100 TODAY and help us share the message of how Dr. King's dream can be fulfilled in the 21st Century.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62211284:6cjupKGNr:m:1:3334294963:4824B4A169D61A06D24C9812CD8D0593:r "Let me tell you, it’s time to embrace Dr. King’s
dream, but that won’t happen if we allow the Democrat Party to divide Americans based on their differences instead of judging people on the
content of their character. Donate $25, $50, or $100 TODAY and help us share the message of how Dr. King’s dream can be fulfilled in the 21st
Century.")** [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62211284:6cjupKGNr:m:1:3334294963:4824B4A169D61A06D24C9812CD8D0593:r "Video")My name is Autry Pruitt and I'm the CEO of New Journey PAC where I have had the privilege of working side-by-side with Bo Snerdley since the organization began. New Journey's purpose is the realignment of the Black American vote with candidates and issues that support conservative values and we've succeeded in helping elect Black conservatives like Rep. Donalds. And we're succeeding in bringing the Black vote over to the GOP because of the ever-increasing Wokeness of the Democrats and their leftist allies. **In fact, if MLK made his "I Have a Dream" speech in today's climate, the Left would surely have canceled him.** They fail to understand an American icon who was taken from us early, but whose actions and words we should emulate daily. if we are truly going to honor Dr. King, then we need to put an end to identity politics. It has done nothing to help our country and it's only been used to cause fear and divide people. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62211284:6cjupKGNr:m:1:3334294963:4824B4A169D61A06D24C9812CD8D0593:r "Video")After 60 years, the Democrats have proven that it isn't making anything more affordable. To Democrats, a successful Black person is one who went to an expensive university and helped some rich white kids deface the statue of an American hero or two along the way. That doesn't sound like any kind of racial progress I'm interested in and it's why liberals like MSNBC's Joy Reid do everything they can to tear down conservative Black Republicans like Byron Donalds. The Democrats want their Black leaders to stay in line and only parrot the Left's talking points. We need more black voices calling for our elected leaders to adhere to the words of Martin Luther King, Jr., and not groups like Black Lives Matter. **[Help us show black voters that we can make freedom ring by following Dr. King's advice to judge people by the content of their character!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62211284:6cjupKGNr:m:1:3334294963:4824B4A169D61A06D24C9812CD8D0593:r "Help us show black voters that
we can make freedom ring by following Dr. King’s advice to judge people by the content of their character!")** Black America continues to prove that it's ready to receive this message and the outcome of the last few elections proves it, but increasing our results requires time and money. We need more men and women like Byron Donalds and Winsome Sears who truly espouse MLK's dream - who are willing to work and prove their merit instead of demanding a handout or remaining dependent on the government. Will you help us honor MLK's birthday the right way by helping us push freedom and prosperity in Black communities and show them the path towards the American Dream? **[Donate today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62211284:6cjupKGNr:m:1:3334294963:4824B4A169D61A06D24C9812CD8D0593:r "Donate today.")** God Bless America and God Bless the late Rev. Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62211284:6cjupKGNr:m:1:3334294963:4824B4A169D61A06D24C9812CD8D0593:r "Autry
Pruitt")
Autry Pruitt
CEO, New Journey PAC

In fact, if MLK made his "I Have a Dream" speech in today's climate, the Left would surely have canceled him. They fail to understand an American icon who was taken from us early, but whose actions and words we should emulate daily. if we are truly going to honor Dr. King, then we need to put an end to identity politics. It has done nothing to help our country and it's only been used to cause fear and divide people. "Video"After 60 years, the Democrats have proven that it isn't making anything more affordable. To Democrats, a successful Black person is one who went to an expensive university and helped some rich white kids deface the statue of an American hero or two along the way. That doesn't sound like any kind of racial progress I'm interested in and it's why liberals like MSNBC's Joy Reid do everything they can to tear down conservative Black Republicans like Byron Donalds. The Democrats want their Black leaders to stay in line and only parrot the Left's talking points. We need more black voices calling for our elected leaders to adhere to the words of Martin Luther King, Jr., and not groups like Black Lives Matter. "Help us show black voters that we can make freedom ring by following Dr. King’s advice to judge people by the content of their character!" Black America continues to prove that it's ready to receive this message and the outcome of the last few elections proves it, but increasing our results requires time and money. We need more men and women like Byron Donalds and Winsome Sears who truly espouse MLK's dream - who are willing to work and prove their merit instead of demanding a handout or remaining dependent on the government. Will you help us honor MLK's birthday the right way by helping us push freedom and prosperity in Black communities and show them the path towards the American Dream? "Donate today." God Bless America and God Bless the late Rev. Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., "Autry Pruitt" Autry Pruitt CEO, New Journey PAC | PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system August 9, 2022. name: Letitia James
subject: Honoring Dr. King’s legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57389288/387782248/265476937?refcode=jtk968-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWUwZWUyZC1hZjk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z3E74deVtWl5oMruAgFHg-7IOgQNx59p7gG2Zeg2kfE=)
---
Peter, today we honor the legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. and his fervent fight for racial equality and our right to vote.

Today is a day to take stock of the progress we’ve made toward ensuring that our democracy works for everyone – and to acknowledge that we still have a long, trying road ahead of us before we achieve true equality.

**That’s why, in honor of Dr. King’s legacy, I wanted to share this voting rights petition with you. I’m looking for 5,000 champions of freedom to sign on to my petition before midnight tonight, so let me know: **
**[Will you add your name now to stand with me to defend voting rights for every American?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57389289/387782249/1440417541?code=jtk968-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=25,50,100,250&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-2023-mlk&refcode=jtk968-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWUwZWUyZC1hZjk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z3E74deVtWl5oMruAgFHg-7IOgQNx59p7gG2Zeg2kfE=&emci=cbb74ef8-5593-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=15e0ee2d-af95-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**

---
Peter, Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s words remain especially relevant today, because despite all the progress we’ve fought for, GOP leaders across our nation are still passing laws that restrict the right to vote, and that burden is _still_ falling disproportionately on Black and brown communities.

In the last two years alone, the GOP leaders in 49 states introduced over 440 voter suppression bills – **_and dozens of these restrictive bills became law_**** _._** That’s why, this Martin Luther King Jr. Day, I’m recommitting myself to the fight for voting rights – and I hope you’ll join me, Peter.

**I need 592 more fearless fighters to sign my petition before midnight, and I’m still missing your signature:[Will you add your name to my petition right now to help me protect and uphold voting rights for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57389291/387782251/1440417541?code=jtk968-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=25,50,100,250&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-2023-mlk&refcode=jtk968-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWUwZWUyZC1hZjk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z3E74deVtWl5oMruAgFHg-7IOgQNx59p7gG2Zeg2kfE=&emci=cbb74ef8-5593-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=15e0ee2d-af95-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**

Letitia

name: Dan Kildee
subject: MLK’s legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Friends,

Today, we honor the life of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.

The vision Dr. King had for our country was never deterred by politics or partisanship. Rather, Dr. King was guided by the belief that every person — no matter their skin color — deserves an equal opportunity to succeed in life. His life continues to serve as an inspiration to me and most Americans to fight for justice and give back to others.

MLK Jr. Day is also a National Day of Service. Michiganders can **[find local volunteer opportunities in your community here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57391354/387789856/-1518691263?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230116_EN_1.1_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_MLK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWQxNjNhYy1iMjk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RdINa8jd3AzNykMGEjaAJ7lNi544UJa8zFc1ST8jrdY=&emci=2f183e59-ec94-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=55d163ac-b295-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=31479900)** I’ll be spending this day visiting constituents at local events across our district.

In honor of Dr. King, let us all commit ourselves to finding ways to help others and advocate for a more just world.

Thank you,

Dan

---

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Remembering the lesson, strengthening the legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/ [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/]
Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. believed in a brighter future for our nation, and today we honor his legacy. While time has passed since the tragic death of Dr. King, the lessons he preached continue to resonate throughout our nation to this day. He fought for peace. He fought for justice. He fought for a world where people were not judged by the color of their skin, but for the content of their character.
http://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/ [http://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/]
Dr. King once said, “Give us the ballot, and we will no longer have to worry the federal government about our basic rights.” He knew that voting was a critical part of racial justice, and it is a fight we are still battling to this day. Communities of color across the nation are still having their vote suppressed, whether it be through gerrymandering, restrictive voting regulations, or unclear information about how to participate in our democracy.
Today, on MLK Day, I double down on my commitment to voting rights. In the North Carolina General Assembly, I fought against unfairly drawn district maps. In Congress, I will support nationwide voting reforms to make it easier to vote and give every eligible American the opportunity to have their voice heard.
I encourage you to look back on the inspirational work of Dr. King today and reflect on what we can do throughout our communities to continue strengthening his legacy.
Be well,
Wiley Nickel
Follow Wiley Online:
https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC [https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC] http://twitter.com/wileynickel [http://twitter.com/wileynickel] http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc [http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc]

Hi friend, **[In a moment, I’m going to ask if you can pitch in a grassroots contribution of $10 or more before we have to halt all fundraising starting this Wednesday, January 18, until April.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57391875/387792145/-1133349033?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230116deadline10_wm_od90ds_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGZiYTUwOC1iNjk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6x9R0BUIzPMH-J_9Da3exT0rne9rXSOXx49N1uTG1g8=)** But first, I hope you’ll let me explain why I’m asking for your support today. In two more days, Aruna and I will be sworn in as your Governor and Lieutenant Governor of Maryland. This is a historic moment for our state: together, we built a diverse, inclusive movement of people from all walks of life who came together and elected me the first Black Governor of Maryland and Aruna the first woman of color Lt. Governor. Through your contributions and volunteering, you helped us make history — and we’re ready to celebrate this achievement in style on Wednesday evening at The People’s Ball with amazing entertainers from all over the state. Then, our work begins. Aruna and I have spent the last few months putting together a top-notch team to tackle the issues facing Marylanders and create a state that leaves no one behind. **But once the clock strikes midnight on January 18, our campaign will enter a fundraising freeze, which means we won’t be able to rebuild our resources over the next few months.** **[That’s why we’re giving it our all to raise $30,000 before 11:59 pm tomorrow, January 17. Can you chip in $10 or more to help us over the finish line before Inauguration Day?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57391878/387792150/-1133349033?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230116deadline10_wm_od90ds_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGZiYTUwOC1iNjk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6x9R0BUIzPMH-J_9Da3exT0rne9rXSOXx49N1uTG1g8=)** **** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: PA Democrats
subject: Reflections on MLK Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
Please join us in honoring the extraordinarily impactful life and legacy of the Reverend Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., one of America’s most beloved heroes whose tireless dedication and courageous actions inspired a revolution of justice, fairness and equity. | | |
---
| | Dear Peter, Please join us in honoring the extraordinarily impactful life and legacy of the Reverend Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., one of America’s most beloved heroes whose tireless dedication and courageous actions inspired a revolution of justice, fairness and equity. The post-Reconstruction era ushered in a dark period of racial and economic oppression nationwide. The implementation of Jim Crow laws denied African Americans the right to vote and caused the revocation of civil rights gained during Reconstruction. This system of segregation led to the demise of our democratic values and threatened to reverse the progress of the civil rights movement, yet Dr. King's leadership helped to spark a revolution that changed the course of our nation's trajectory.
---
---
His profound impact on American history has led to House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries becoming the first Black party leader, the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania's most diverse state assembly on record, and the Pennsylvania Democratic State Party electing its first black chair. As we contemplate Dr. King's remarkable mission and acknowledge his deep ties to Pennsylvania - from his April 2, 1957 visit to Philadelphia as the recipient of the prestigious National Fellowship Award of the Philadelphia Fellowship Commission to his time as a graduate student at Crozer Theological Seminary in Chester - let us reaffirm our commitment to the struggle for justice and equity for all. In Unity, Pennsylvania Democrats
---
| Thank you for supporting the Pennsylvania Democratic Party. Pennsylvania is one of the most important swing states in the country. Donald Trump won Pennsylvania in 2016, and in 2020, we flipped our Commonwealth blue and elected Joe Biden. If we're going to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in 2022, we need your help. clean_body: Please join us in honoring the extraordinarily impactful life and legacy of the Reverend Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., one of America’s most beloved heroes whose tireless dedication and courageous actions inspired a revolution of justice, fairness and equity. | | | | | Dear Peter, Please join us in honoring the extraordinarily impactful life and legacy of the Reverend Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., one of America’s most beloved heroes whose tireless dedication and courageous actions inspired a revolution of justice, fairness and equity. The post-Reconstruction era ushered in a dark period of racial and economic oppression nationwide. The implementation of Jim Crow laws denied African Americans the right to vote and caused the revocation of civil rights gained during Reconstruction. This system of segregation led to the demise of our democratic values and threatened to reverse the progress of the civil rights movement, yet Dr. King's leadership helped to spark a revolution that changed the course of our nation's trajectory. His profound impact on American history has led to House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries becoming the first Black party leader, the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania's most diverse state assembly on record, and the Pennsylvania Democratic State Party electing its first black chair. As we contemplate Dr. King's remarkable mission and acknowledge his deep ties to Pennsylvania - from his April 2, 1957 visit to Philadelphia as the recipient of the prestigious National Fellowship Award of the Philadelphia Fellowship Commission to his time as a graduate student at Crozer Theological Seminary in Chester - let us reaffirm our commitment to the struggle for justice and equity for all. In Unity, Pennsylvania Democrats | Thank you for supporting the Pennsylvania Democratic Party. Pennsylvania is one of the most important swing states in the country. Donald Trump won Pennsylvania in 2016, and in 2020, we flipped our Commonwealth blue and elected Joe Biden. If we're going to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in 2022, we need your help. = Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. name: Hillary Scholten
subject: Dr. King’s legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
Today, I’m reflecting on Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.’s legacy and immeasurable contributions to our nation.

| Today, I’m reflecting on Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.’s legacy and immeasurable contributions to our nation – and at the same time, acknowledging how much work we still must do to achieve racial justice and true equity in this nation.

I’ve committed my life to social justice – including advancing racial justice through voting rights, addressing housing and educational disparities and fighting discrimination in the criminal justice system. That work continues now in my representation in Congress.

Together, let’s use today’s celebration of Dr. King to recommit to the fight for fair representation, justice, and equity for Black Americans.

In solidarity,
Hillary
---

---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I'll get straight to the point:

I'm writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden's open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs0iufpkjo8400kta95ara6unasncp3po2oobp2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c3geepb6cph2bs)**

It's critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media's deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation's history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump 's term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden's immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden's "policies" have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo69m6pic9t98v9uliqn2aq9j2ljcggh7m30rlpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c3geepb6cph2bs)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsmebiuqdamu70bgqndbio1tc2ngp28jlo4maoh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c3geepb6cph2bs)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhh7226ncamjdgg4e8a6eh1k75linua9mpnrmifg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c3geepb6cph2bs)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Willie=20Montague?=
subject: Martin Luther King's Birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fredrick Douglass PAC
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=2465219909&e=fdefed58de)
---
Hello Peter,
My name is Willie Montague and I’m writing to you today, on the observance of Martin Luther King, Jr. Day. I’m a father, pastor and unapologetic Constitutional Conservative and I am here to tell you that if Dr. King were alive today, he would be stunned at what he was seeing.Dr. King’s core beliefs, things like self-government based on absolute truth and moral law, are profoundly Conservative and make up the cornerstone of our political value system. The planks of the modern liberal platform reject these notions but Conservatives respect them. The liberals have tried to take ownership of his legacy, but in actuality, his message was fundamentally conservative!!**IT IS TIME FOR CONSERVATIVES TO LAY CLAIM TO THE LEGACY OF DR. KING** I have written to you before, but let me refresh your memory. A while back, I launched the Frederick Douglass PAC. The aim of the PAC is to help some of the most viable candidates in this nation win their races and to increase engagement of black people in the conservative movement.Like Dr. King and Frederick Douglass, the namesake of this PAC, I believe that judging someone on the color of their skin is inherently unjust and that judgment based on moral character is the only way and that notion is the essence of Conservatism. Modern Liberals don’t want you to know that, though. They want to co-opt the legacies of these two great Black leaders, and others like them, for their own good.**THAT’S WHY IT’S VITAL THAT WE ENGAGE MORE BLACK PEOPLE IN CONSERVATIVE POLITICS**
| [CLICK HERE TO SUPPORT THE FREDRICK DOUGLASS PAC’S BLACK OUTREACH PROGRAMS!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=7c0dc99e6f&e=fdefed58de)
---
The original civil rights movement told Black people that the principles of human equality and self-determination are God-given and unalienable. It was a message that resonated and that means that at their core, Black people are more conservative than they realize! Our party is trying to unite, not divide like the leftists.But if we are going to have a unified Conservative party, it’s important that we have engagement from Black people. By educating Black voters and getting Black Conservatives elected, we will guarantee majorities in future elections and won’t have to worry about getting Donald Trump re-elected in 2024.The Frederick Douglass PAC hopes to educate, empower and equip candidates with the tools they need to win their races, and part of that strategy is connecting with Black voters who many times don't vote or simply vote Democrat due to having done so their whole lives.**WE WILL NEED YOUR HELP IF WE WANT TO ENGAGE WITH PATRIOTIC BLACK CONSERVATIVES!**
| [INVEST IN BLACK GOP OUTREACH RIGHT NOW!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=462baea0c9&e=fdefed58de)
---
My name is Willie Montague, I’m a Black man from Orlando Florida. I’m a pastor, activist and a lifelong Republican. I know that with the right amount of investment in Black outreach the GOP could secure MANY more victories across this nation... even in districts that we don’t typically think of.Unfortunately, the GOP has not done much in terms of outreach to the Black community. We need to be funding boots on the ground in **Black neighborhoods** , educating **Black voters** and recruiting future **Black candidates**.I need you to rush in your support to the Frederick Douglass PAC TODAY. With your support, we can organize outreach programs that will help guarantee Republican majorities in the future!

clean_body: | | | Hello Peter, My name is Willie Montague and I’m writing to you today, on the observance of Martin Luther King, Jr. Day. I’m a father, pastor and unapologetic Constitutional Conservative and I am here to tell you that if Dr. King were alive today, he would be stunned at what he was seeing.Dr. King’s core beliefs, things like self-government based on absolute truth and moral law, are profoundly Conservative and make up the cornerstone of our political value system. The planks of the modern liberal platform reject these notions but Conservatives respect them. The liberals have tried to take ownership of his legacy, but in actuality, his message was fundamentally conservative!!IT IS TIME FOR CONSERVATIVES TO LAY CLAIM TO THE LEGACY OF DR. KING I have written to you before, but let me refresh your memory. A while back, I launched the Frederick Douglass PAC. The aim of the PAC is to help some of the most viable candidates in this nation win their races and to increase engagement of black people in the conservative movement.Like Dr. King and Frederick Douglass, the namesake of this PAC, I believe that judging someone on the color of their skin is inherently unjust and that judgment based on moral character is the only way and that notion is the essence of Conservatism. Modern Liberals don’t want you to know that, though. They want to co-opt the legacies of these two great Black leaders, and others like them, for their own good.THAT’S WHY IT’S VITAL THAT WE ENGAGE MORE BLACK PEOPLE IN CONSERVATIVE POLITICS | The original civil rights movement told Black people that the principles of human equality and self-determination are God-given and unalienable. It was a message that resonated and that means that at their core, Black people are more conservative than they realize! Our party is trying to unite, not divide like the leftists.But if we are going to have a unified Conservative party, it’s important that we have engagement from Black people. By educating Black voters and getting Black Conservatives elected, we will guarantee majorities in future elections and won’t have to worry about getting Donald Trump re-elected in 2024.The Frederick Douglass PAC hopes to educate, empower and equip candidates with the tools they need to win their races, and part of that strategy is connecting with Black voters who many times don't vote or simply vote Democrat due to having done so their whole lives.WE WILL NEED YOUR HELP IF WE WANT TO ENGAGE WITH PATRIOTIC BLACK CONSERVATIVES! | My name is Willie Montague, I’m a Black man from Orlando Florida. I’m a pastor, activist and a lifelong Republican. I know that with the right amount of investment in Black outreach the GOP could secure MANY more victories across this nation... even in districts that we don’t typically think of.Unfortunately, the GOP has not done much in terms of outreach to the Black community. We need to be funding boots on the ground in Black neighborhoods , educating Black voters and recruiting future Black candidates.I need you to rush in your support to the Frederick Douglass PAC TODAY. With your support, we can organize outreach programs that will help guarantee Republican majorities in the future! | | | | | | | | | Sincerely,Willie Montague - President and Founder of Fredrick Douglass PAC | Paid for by Fredrick Douglass PAC | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2023 American Conservatives United. All rights reserved.

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Remembering a fighter for justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
We must carry on his torch
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57394686/387803956/-849735382?refcode=EM_C_230119MLK_H_SB_30DO_3_NG_N_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2E2NjU0MS1iZjk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QheVn8Wp8vS_fYdYAx0SlQ-ui640nOPmGIeHpCpFfHo=) Peter,

Reverend Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. was nothing short of a trailblazer for civil rights and justice for Black Americans. And as I enter my first full term Congressional term, I wanted to take a moment to reflect on our current state of justice and equality.

Dr. King Jr. and so many other civil rights leaders are why we have our voting rights today. They put their lives on the line to ensure every American has the right to vote. But now, those same voting rights are under constant threat. We can never take these fundamental rights for granted, and I will remain vigilant to protect these rights as we head into the 118th Congress.

As we kick off the new legislative session under a GOP-controlled House and the Republican Party with voting rights in their sight after a humbling defeat last November, we must do everything to protect them no matter the obstacles posed.

It’s time for Congress to prove it truly respects the memory of the late Reverend and further protect our voting rights by passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. Whether or not the GOP stands in our way, we must renew the fight to advance voting rights.

So as we commemorate Martin Luther King Jr. and the accomplishments of the Civil Rights Movement, let’s look forward to how we’ll protect our fundamental right to vote today and continue to bend the arc toward justice!

Thank you,

Shontel Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**
---

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Teaching your children about the dangers of socialism
body:
And it’s no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders lure them in with promises of un

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zstm60fulo5jg79lor2klu66p5l30mlvlq44clp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c3ge1ob4clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation's youth. And it's no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders lure them in with promises of universal health care and a free college education.

But today's young people don't understand the true realities of socialism--or the clever ways it's being introduced to them.

That's why our latest addition to The Libertas Institute's _Tuttle Twins_ series is so important, _["The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism."](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2sf25c570dqu2ig55vak046tmbr54ujo5s68178_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c3ge1ob4clh2bs)_
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlv2jvac1qrng1oppvbs0gcugvj2lr7o6emhhtog_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c3ge1ob4clh2bs)
---
| | You can get your free copy using this secure link:

[https://act.libertas.org/tt-subtle-ways](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zckip4plha1kqg0ooctr8ges6916j84rl83168t0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c3ge1ob4clh2bs)

Inside this eBook, you'll get an in-depth look at some of the socialist concepts being fed to your children. But more importantly, you'll discover practical ways to explain socialism while teaching your children important liberty-based principles of how to live free.

If you're concerned with the rise in socialism in our country--especially among our nation's youth--this is the eBook for YOU!

Please use this link to get instant access to your free copy of, [_The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism._](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlkd4qga604so4unsjh56j9c35th1681uvkdafno_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c3ge1ob4clh2bs)

Thank you,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
Founder, Libertas Institute

body:

Because today is Martin Luther King Jr. Day, we wanted to take a moment and honor the civil rights icon by doubling down on the fight to restore voting rights across the country. Republicans have been shameless in their attempts to suppress votes, especially in low-income neighborhoods and communities of color. There is nothing more fundamental to the preservation of our democracy than protecting the right to vote. That’s why today (and everyday!) it’s so important to stand up and demand Republicans stop passing blatant attempts at voter suppression — [_**so we’re asking you to add your name to this petition in support of voting rights:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57395696/387808194/-1540171830?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230116_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWZlMGU4MTAtYzE5NS1lZDExLTlkN2ItMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=evIrdek9Pa_oRygDfwVwmytzX_03QwWIqymcvbpyDyk=&emci=c9ebb3eb-8193-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=afe0e810-c195-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1720400) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57395697/387808195/-1540171830?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230116_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWZlMGU4MTAtYzE5NS1lZDExLTlkN2ItMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=evIrdek9Pa_oRygDfwVwmytzX_03QwWIqymcvbpyDyk=&emci=c9ebb3eb-8193-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=afe0e810-c195-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1720400)

clean_body: | = Because today is Martin Luther King Jr. Day, we wanted to take a moment and honor the civil rights icon by doubling down on the fight to restore voting rights across the country. Republicans have been shameless in their attempts to suppress votes, especially in low-income neighborhoods and communities of color. There is nothing more fundamental to the preservation of our democracy than protecting the right to vote. That’s why today (and everyday!) it’s so important to stand up and demand Republicans stop passing blatant attempts at voter suppression — | Thanks, HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
