---
Friend,
---
Record-high inflation left Americans struggling to pay the bills. The border crisis let drugs flood the country and left families feeling unsafe. Violent crime has risen in cities across America. From record-high inflation to an out-of-control border crisis and reckless spending sprees, Biden and the far Left have fueled chaos across the country. **_But, a beautiful thing about America_** is that our story doesn’t end when things get tough. We live in a country where even on our worst days, we are blessed to be here. Because you and I have the power to change things for the better. Now it’s our turn to do exactly that. We can’t sit back and blame the Left for our country’s problems. We have to offer solutions and follow through. We have to come together and rally behind freedom-loving conservatives who will defend and uphold our Constitution. That’s what I’ve been doing, and what I’ll continue to do. It’s why I launched Stand For America PAC two years ago, and it’s why I’ve spent my time traveling the country endorsing and financially supporting strong conservatives. [**I’m asking for your help to keep this mission going. If you have anything to spare to support conservatives, pitch in to Stand For America PAC now.**](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=5993bf636ba1413c9dd471f7ca02312d&_e=-Az83FIO2w4ospbbiVvvv__bTu7EuCKLRCDa84ssPqKLooDHFrzlz8zLLzl1cd4hLpPaobC8IcDHMGmyqPl2ccE8E8DjGOIRlwjNAR6JAJ6Ee0792iF2iqiWBHj9lHRmIHn_on-BVWYWfcmMZs7QNJX4sK97cIQcIk1sbCDCGW74YHkLjjPGzSGLVFhA1w7XoV58knuilCaUhvaP-9eC5H1VbDuXsFmcQh8StGP7MaaXF-uCuNT8g8Cm5tY6B2CziPcs-a_mjEU48f6MkYjcGXY0A7QXTiLrDQFCc8eqeodnOFXVZQIJByVqUmoQLLTpThY_fOXG8ot4R_VH-o1t8PQhjIfi7Ei9Wm136hg1bss%3D) My very best,

clean_body: | | | Friend, Record-high inflation left Americans struggling to pay the bills. The border crisis let drugs flood the country and left families feeling unsafe. Violent crime has risen in cities across America. From record-high inflation to an out-of-control border crisis and reckless spending sprees, Biden and the far Left have fueled chaos across the country. But, a beautiful thing about America is that our story doesn’t end when things get tough. We live in a country where even on our worst days, we are blessed to be here. Because you and I have the power to change things for the better. Now it’s our turn to do exactly that. We can’t sit back and blame the Left for our country’s problems. We have to offer solutions and follow through. We have to come together and rally behind freedom-loving conservatives who will defend and uphold our Constitution. That’s what I’ve been doing, and what I’ll continue to do. It’s why I launched Stand For America PAC two years ago, and it’s why I’ve spent my time traveling the country endorsing and financially supporting strong conservatives. My very best, Nikki Haley | | | Nikki Haley here. I want to make sure you have a signed copy of my new book. There are only a few signed copies left. It’s called “If You Want Something Done...” and it profiles bold, courageous women and the lessons they teach us about making a difference, overcoming adversity, and sticking to principle. | | Copyright © 2023 Stand For America PAC, All rights reserved. www.standforamericapac.com Contributions are not tax-deductible. name: Emilia Sykes
subject: Reflecting on the legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57393259/387797642/-1657784636?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Nzk1YTM4ZC1iODk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=llFk3OVwT599oN10d17GtjOtiag4xHiT05WLgm8IyFE=&emci=a80fa9c9-8f92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=8795a38d-b895-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=11703046)
Peter,

I want to take a moment to reflect on the historic life and immeasurable legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.

Dr. King devoted his life to the pursuit of a more equitable nation for all Americans – a nation where everyone, regardless of background, community, or creed, could prosper and live free from discrimination.

And while we have made significant progress towards the ideals of justice, equity, and opportunity that Dr. King championed, we have a long way to go before his dream of a truly equal nation will be realized.

**Peter, it is up to us to continue Dr. King’s fight for racial justice, economic advancement, voting rights, and equal opportunity.**

It is not lost on me that, as I continue this fight in the halls of Congress, I stand on the shoulders of leaders like Dr. King. As the first Black person ever elected to represent Ohio’s 13th Congressional District, I carry the names and legacies of those who came before me – including Dr. King.

So today, in his memory, may we all reaffirm our commitment to leading with love, serving our communities, fighting for justice, and creating a better nation for generations to come.

Onward,

Emilia
---

| Emilia Sykes is running to represent Ohio's 13th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit [EmiliaSykesForCongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57393260/387797644/-1657784636?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Nzk1YTM4ZC1iODk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=llFk3OVwT599oN10d17GtjOtiag4xHiT05WLgm8IyFE=&emci=a80fa9c9-8f92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=8795a38d-b895-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=11703046)

| Team,

Every year in the month of January, we honor the Rev. Dr. Martin Luther King and remember his work to create a better America.

Dr. King’s work touched many different policy points, including voting rights, racial equality and income equality. Sadly, both in Arizona and across America, the fight for all three of those policies continues.

**Which is why on this designated day to honor Dr. King, we’re committed to continuing to fight for fairness when it comes to voting, racial equality, and income equality.**

Hopefully one day, we can say that Dr. King’s dreams and goals are achieved. Until then, we will continue Dr. King’s work.

Sincerely,

Arizona Democrats

| The Arizona Democratic Party is working around the clock to ensure Democratic candidates are elected up and down the ballot — candidates who will fight for what YOU value most, like affordable healthcare for every Arizonan, economic stability and job opportunities for working families, and representation for the most marginalized among us. **Help us continue to build a party that is fighting for all Arizonans. Become a monthly donor.**

name: American Action News
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6334nm7mfg12b6t0kd9eh8jalhcohmj0n2sptto_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg6cpr0cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0eh612lnn3s66t2bhpadhilbplhtnnd0d02dhj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg6cpr0cjh2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z46uhto0c1lg577v19vu2o36s175ts6kerpg0ot0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg6cpr0cjh2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2zji6p993oe2v8qaj9te340jes09fohv7i4md9kq8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmfq58ub47l5np3rgigkh6k9g0og0ashqf5fah90_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7cpie0pj7c1ie49fg)

name: Team AOC
subject: A legacy of anti-racism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Are you looking for MLK service events?
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230116-3800-header&t=1&akid=3800%2E2526796%2EdIXtg3)
Today is Martin Luther King, Jr. Day!
Dr. King’s legacy is rich with lessons of anti-racism, anti-poverty, and anti-imperialism. Alexandria spoke to this while discussing Dr. King at a Faith Leader Breakfast:
**“King’s life ended because he was dangerous to some of the core, basic beliefs of injustice upon which this country was founded. If we want to pick up and honor him where he left off, we have to be willing to be dangerous, too. We have to be dangerous to injustice, dangerous to racism, dangerous to white supremacy, dangerous to a logic and a form of late-stage capitalism that says that says the richest in society are more worthy than the poorest.”**
Much of MLK, Jr.’s work was centered in community growth and empowerment, so the best way we can think of to honor him is to continue this legacy of community service.
**Are you looking for MLK service events in your area? We’re here to help!**
* Visit [**MLKDay.gov**](http://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15986?t=2&akid=3800%2E2526796%2EdIXtg3) , organized by AmeriCorps, to find virtual and in-person volunteer opportunities in your community, and explore other resources for local organizing near you.

* Check out the [**Idealist**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15987?t=3&akid=3800%2E2526796%2EdIXtg3) website to connect with volunteer social networks, support continued COVID-19 relief efforts, and find other locally-based volunteer opportunities.

* Use [**Catchafire**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15988?t=4&akid=3800%2E2526796%2EdIXtg3) to find flexible, virtual volunteer opportunities tailored to your skill set for various national causes.

**Dr. King showed us that the only way to fight injustice is to stand together and build up our communities.** We hope you will join us in that mission and honor his legacy today.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20230116-3800-P_ORG_VOL_MIS&t=9&refcode2=3800_2526796_dIXtg3&akid=3800%2E2526796%2EdIXtg3)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230116-3800-P_ORG_VOL_MIS&t=10&akid=3800%2E2526796%2EdIXtg3)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=11&akid=3800%2E2526796%2EdIXtg3) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=12&akid=3800%2E2526796%2EdIXtg3) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=13&akid=3800%2E2526796%2EdIXtg3)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Alexandria spoke to this while discussing Dr. King at a Faith Leader Breakfast: “King’s life ended because he was dangerous to some of the core, basic beliefs of injustice upon which this country was founded. If we want to pick up and honor him where he left off, we have to be willing to be dangerous, too. We have to be dangerous to injustice, dangerous to racism, dangerous to white supremacy, dangerous to a logic and a form of late-stage capitalism that says that says the richest in society are more worthy than the poorest.” Much of MLK, Jr.’s work was centered in community growth and empowerment, so the best way we can think of to honor him is to continue this legacy of community service. Are you looking for MLK service events in your area? We’re here to help! Visit , organized by AmeriCorps, to find virtual and in-person volunteer opportunities in your community, and explore other resources for local organizing near you. Check out the website to connect with volunteer social networks, support continued COVID-19 relief efforts, and find other locally-based volunteer opportunities. Use to find flexible, virtual volunteer opportunities tailored to your skill set for various national causes. Dr. King showed us that the only way to fight injustice is to stand together and build up our communities. We hope you will join us in that mission and honor his legacy today. In solidarity, Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrvj137mkm468bfp0tio8sgio7ci3040cc1khm1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg6cpr4cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6899s2i2v0ug6jsj1on0q2uvt7965ecva549nh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg6cpr4cph2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0amspa5539gq4qr5ur6m11lfe5nl4fnu59kf0o0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg6cpr4cph2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d250d385c8484f18aa907d5fe7a46fc4&_e=ho41mYkxvNS9M2NQ827aXYHgM4-PV06uzZnzOhHv4tW20Hl-Cl6f83gTyjeslq8xAD1E2lc07aVg8YhuVgaP1avvFoYTRxTd-Ck8vvlutwom84LX6Lg92rV9B7TwET62FRp4f5isC5Rh4w2xzAGxaz_tBUzqvspcI2z5lBSuVg_kXfPwW1x1NXkWBwwUBzufC89TYrd3ft-8tc3cjBIT6km4k7qd6eedEvDZshMrtYGaMg5jpH-7ki_OZgxCLiDa3Ol6zEcDuDAihGkK_t4IFEIaHSirGxCKHAp6aTLZBGFbhLEwgh-p5bI5qTExryhP92puQGDLKvjRD7LyEZ49hQ%3D%3D) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d250d385c8484f18aa907d5fe7a46fc4&_e=ho41mYkxvNS9M2NQ827aXYHgM4-PV06uzZnzOhHv4tW20Hl-Cl6f83gTyjeslq8xAD1E2lc07aVg8YhuVgaP1avvFoYTRxTd-Ck8vvlutwom84LX6Lg92rV9B7TwET62FRp4f5isC5Rh4w2xzAGxaz_tBUzqvspcI2z5lBSuVg_kXfPwW1x1NXkWBwwUBzufKZubpoMA0Hz_zwxhwsXByWmMXUKTHD7qHHfeirco4fbKdOaeMH1_JlDy6xL0rXkIF31bpOqA8lJSGaIPe94LNuiqmfH4krRqsdCYjPLqe-lP7-Q75qzH9sCyPfNnib3T5jENKhD0KjvY53YrscWxtA%3D%3D) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can 't help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who've been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang ...while hoping that the guards wouldn't show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they're being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn't even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he's been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven 't held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d250d385c8484f18aa907d5fe7a46fc4&_e=ho41mYkxvNS9M2NQ827aXYHgM4-PV06uzZnzOhHv4tW20Hl-Cl6f83gTyjeslq8xAD1E2lc07aVg8YhuVgaP1avvFoYTRxTd-Ck8vvlutwom84LX6Lg92rV9B7TwET62FRp4f5isC5Rh4w2xzAGxaz_tBUzqvspcI2z5lBSuVg_kXfPwW1x1NXkWBwwUBzufHQoD48Si0r5_TRCKKRbIx30Q-VXEs_Jqof5SHUmIt4N_fkldCsgryYbJSTsVvPWzczQy-dVv74_3IuJU4f7PEwo7o2Afnuy4RDa0RhEyANX0Qdg4JXRqbJQAHMsiU7X4lHQnvbLiJbNtGAzcOmSsHA%3D%3D)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d250d385c8484f18aa907d5fe7a46fc4&_e=ho41mYkxvNS9M2NQ827aXYHgM4-PV06uzZnzOhHv4tW20Hl-Cl6f83gTyjeslq8xAD1E2lc07aVg8YhuVgaP1avvFoYTRxTd-Ck8vvlutwom84LX6Lg92rV9B7TwET62FRp4f5isC5Rh4w2xzAGxaz_tBUzqvspcI2z5lBSuVg_kXfPwW1x1NXkWBwwUBzufpXb6lVBN-oFnZlMjdZC0jeNtZQsK8b9EySMICt-Z62VALnb0_G6lXlfM4TDgXNpjusZv5-i9AW4w3Wfa1xtDZTLOo4OB3Gql2RjfqGNy5kQkrpgo6aVmCgZc4faDwV5_zHKH8d-p9CpxgEN1YPrsnQ%3D%3D)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can 't fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d250d385c8484f18aa907d5fe7a46fc4&_e=ho41mYkxvNS9M2NQ827aXYHgM4-PV06uzZnzOhHv4tW20Hl-Cl6f83gTyjeslq8xAD1E2lc07aVg8YhuVgaP1avvFoYTRxTd-Ck8vvlutwom84LX6Lg92rV9B7TwET62FRp4f5isC5Rh4w2xzAGxaz_tBUzqvspcI2z5lBSuVg_kXfPwW1x1NXkWBwwUBzuf6zYn7Cd-F8TXa7C6o4gv6PpOnggMrdaBMw_2jrEcyhz1LMzOZ_eZMZKT8Nt3T9LlXoo0OL2GhXxDa6Lo1KKO1zOb9RpRUozPkODIXxQzkY-h1xfa6wSBk1NKgsL8oCAtrVd-eJb9hzJdftX-VddGEg%3D%3D)

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he's been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments. As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba! Many of these jailed patriots haven 't held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days. That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time. I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years. You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN! And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court. I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray. Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation. Thank you so much! Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are you concerned about Biden’s open border extremism?
body:
Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point:

| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb4ajgt5c0oirhl3rdcv028alhuce37q3t2j2vn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg6apb4cph2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I'll get straight to the point:

I'm writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden's open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkjqti9hobh1637mg4jlvbh92c7h6pkv4o5e17m0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg6apb4cph2bs)**

It's critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media's deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation's history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump 's term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden's immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden's "policies" have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ziahbooe311141gos9jhcd7cjo5ep24iilc5avmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg6apb4cph2bs)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7mbu0oir77rnjsn58lpbhopunabhttefmnkm6t8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg6apb4cph2bs)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ze5lcvr5tt8ul47ckbl8p0d865gfoig2ll5c6ejg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg6apb4cph2bs)

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: Remembering Martin Luther King Jr.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | Friends,

Today, we remember Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. and the Civil Rights Movement.

His groundbreaking work in the 1950s and 60s shaped America into the country we know today. During this time of national uncertainty, I’m thinking about his dream for this nation.

Dr. King told us what America could be, and I believe in his dream. I’m determined to make his dream, and the dreams of millions of Americans, a reality.

We are diverse. We are dynamic. We are hopeful for the future. But we still have work to do to make this country equal and just for all of us.

So, today, please take a moment with me to remember the work of Dr. King and others like Congressman John Lewis who fought tirelessly for our country.

Yours,

Josh

---
|
---

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: Happy Martin Luther King Jr. Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Today we celebrate the life and legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. and his commitment to justice and equality for all Americans. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57394517/387803336/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGE2NjU0MS1iZjk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YwTcVb7lsHEYHX2zLH_J32FsEiRoANgTwjqwyl2owCg=&emci=96f20973-5193-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=38a66541-bf95-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=15820338)
---
Happy Martin Luther King Jr. Day, Peter!

Today we celebrate the life and legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. and his commitment to justice and equality for all Americans.

This year will mark the 60th anniversary of the March on Washington. This march was led by Dr. King and called for civil and voting rights protections. The work of Dr. King and other activists led to the passage of the Voting Rights Act of 1965 and marked a huge step forward in the fight for equity in our nation.

In the decades since this historic march, we've made incredible strides as a nation toward justice and equity. But this change has come slowly and our work is far from over.

As your congresswoman, I'm dedicated to fighting for legislation that gets us closer to Dr. King's vision for America – voting rights protections, anti-discrimination laws, civil rights protections, and more.

I hope you'll join me today in taking time to honor Dr. King's legacy, and vow to continue working towards fulfilling his dream of equal rights for all.

Thank you,

Kim
| Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
---

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: Honoring Dr. King
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. was one of this nation's greatest civil rights warriors.

|
---
| Peter,

Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. was one of this nation's greatest civil rights warriors. To truly honor him and all those that fought alongside him, all those that have struggled, and all those that have lost their lives, we must uphold his vision for what our nation could truly be.

This Martin Luther King Day, let us recommit ourselves to dismantling systems of oppression and fighting against inequality to ensure peace and justice for all.

Dr. King changed the course of history with the legacy he left behind, and we must take the time to reflect and remember all the sacrifices that led our nation here.

Thank you, Dr. King.

Sincerely,

Valerie Foushee
---

* * *
| |

---
Paid for by Foushee for Congress
Valerie Foushee for Congress
PO Box 16446

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: “There is no time for apathy or complacency.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
When I think of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr’s legacy, I am reminded of the power of his words. In a time of great injustice, Dr. King's words cut through decades of violent segregation and devastating poverty, inspiring millions of people to action.
Dr. King taught us that we must speak truth to power, and we must do it over and over again. **He taught us that the time is always now to fight for what is right.**
In a time of rising political violence, vicious xenophobia, and economic inequality, these are the words that resonate with me now more than ever. I hope they will bring you strength and remind you that we are in this fight together -- always.
“We are now faced with the fact that **_tomorrow is today._** We are confronted with the **fierce urgency of now.** In this unfolding conundrum of life and history, there is such a thing as being too late. **There is no time for apathy or complacency. This is a time for vigorous and positive action.** ” **— Martin Luther King, Jr. in 1967**
---
Thank you for fighting with me,
Pramila

name: Sen. Raphael Warnock (via Democrats.org)
subject: The legacy left by Dr. King
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
I often find myself reflecting on a quote from Dr. King that says, "We all are tied together in a single garment of destiny. We all exist in the same community and an inescapable network of mutuality." | |
---
I often find myself reflecting on a quote from Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. that says we all are “caught in an inescapable network of mutuality, tied in a single garment of destiny. Whatever affects one directly affects all indirectly.” This is a quote and a concept that guides every single one of my votes and decisions in the United States Senate. It guided my recent reelection campaign, where I was committed to bringing Georgians in and together. **I’m grateful for each and every one of you who helped power my campaign. This team is helping to power our fight towards equality and justice.** Every day, but especially today, we remember Dr. King’s powerful legacy, but we must also reflect on the unfinished business he left for all of us. We’ve got to secure the right to vote for every eligible American. We’ve got to fight to continue delivering lower costs and better health care for all people. And above all, we’ve got to keep the faith. Because when we do this, we can produce a world of positive difference through our actions that will impact future generations to come. So, Derek, I hope you’ll join me in commemorating this Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. Day by continuing his work and marching towards a better, more just future dedicated to all Americans. With you every step of the way, Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock
U.S. Senator, Georgia

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Bending the moral arc of the universe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57395216/387806553/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzkyMWYzYi1jMDk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2FPxMm2anTPeOE0kCFwmsYHMLmc7hVdZGEPLAxCXDeo=&emci=73b97c0a-9693-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=03921f3b-c095-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=7731215)
---

| | **Today is Martin Luther King Jr. Day, and there's no better way to honor Dr. King's legacy than by fighting harder than ever for our democracy.** One of my favorite quotes is Dr. King's proclamation that "_the moral arc of the universe is long, but it bends towards justice_." But I've always believed that it doesn't bend toward justice on its own – we have to do the hard work, every single day, to bend the moral arc of the universe. And of course, there are extremist politicians trying to bend the universe in the other direction. They know they'll lose every election if every eligible voter was allowed to vote. So they shrink the pool of eligible voters with dehumanizing policies and anti-democratic tactics. In the Jim Crow era, it was poll taxes and literacy tests. Today, it's closing polling stations, voter registration purges, and making it harder to vote by mail. **Right-wing politicians across the country are again employing these same obstacles to prevent certain people — especially communities of color — from voting.** I'm fighting back, and I know you are too. I'm fighting to reform the Senate's filibuster rules, so we can actually hold up-or-down votes to pass bills that heal our democracy. I'm fighting for nationwide mail-in voting. And I'm fighting to get big money out of our elections and end partisan gerrymandering. The fight for democracy itself is where Martin Luther King's dream will live or die. That's why I won't stop dreaming, and I won't stop fighting to bend the moral arc of the universe towards justice. And I know you won't either. Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | clean_body: | | | | Today is Martin Luther King Jr. Day, and there's no better way to honor Dr. King's legacy than by fighting harder than ever for our democracy. One of my favorite quotes is Dr. King's proclamation that "the moral arc of the universe is long, but it bends towards justice." But I've always believed that it doesn't bend toward justice on its own – we have to do the hard work, every single day, to bend the moral arc of the universe. And of course, there are extremist politicians trying to bend the universe in the other direction. They know they'll lose every election if every eligible voter was allowed to vote. So they shrink the pool of eligible voters with dehumanizing policies and anti-democratic tactics. In the Jim Crow era, it was poll taxes and literacy tests. Today, it's closing polling stations, voter registration purges, and making it harder to vote by mail. Right-wing politicians across the country are again employing these same obstacles to prevent certain people — especially communities of color — from voting. I'm fighting back, and I know you are too. I'm fighting to reform the Senate's filibuster rules, so we can actually hold up-or-down votes to pass bills that heal our democracy. I'm fighting for nationwide mail-in voting. And I'm fighting to get big money out of our elections and end partisan gerrymandering. The fight for democracy itself is where Martin Luther King's dream will live or die. That's why I won't stop dreaming, and I won't stop fighting to bend the moral arc of the universe towards justice. And I know you won't either. Onward! Jeff | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Mike Thompson
subject: Lest we forget
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://support
body:
# [#]
Peter,

Today, we remember the important activism and work to which Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. dedicated his life.

As Dr. King once said, “History will have to record that the greatest tragedy of this period of social transition was not the strident clamor of the bad people, but the appalling silence of the good people.”

As we remember the life and legacy of one of our nation's greatest civil rights leaders, we must not forget Dr. King’s message of hope in a time of darkness. Our progress forward is not finished, and together, we can create a nation Dr. King dreamed of.

Sincerely,

Mike Thompson

name: Replace Sinema
subject: MLK's son on Kyrsten Sinema
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
"History will remember Sen. Sinema unkindly." | |
---
___"But even more, all types of conniving methods are still being used to prevent Negroes from becoming registered voters. The denial of this sacred right is a tragic betrayal of the highest mandates of our democratic tradition. And so our most urgent request to the president of the United States and every member of Congress is to give us the right to vote. [...] In this juncture of our nation’s history, there is an urgent need for dedicated and courageous leadership. If we are to solve the problems ahead and make racial justice a reality, this leadership must be fourfold." --_ Dr. King in his "Give Us the Ballot" Address, May 1957 Peter, Today, as we honor the legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King, we must remember that the fight for civil rights, justice, and equality is not over -- and there's so much more work to be done. Dr. King understood that at the foundation of this struggle is the right to vote. Unfortunately, the right to vote is still under attack by right-wing conservatives who seek to suppress the votes of Black people, people of color, and anyone who doesn't agree with them. Arizona has been an epicenter of these attacks -- with the right wing legislature and former Governor Doug Ducey signing some of the most restrictive voting laws in the nation last year. And the federal government has not stepped in. This is in large part because of the Republican filibuster of voting rights legislation -- the filibuster that Senator Kyrsten Sinema upheld. [**Help replace Kyrsten Sinema with a Senator who will fight to restore voting rights for all Americans >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcFaPhWsIDdanmCdGMfh4tdOz71BKWllZacyr2-2OG11Rf_cPuCjxuriYzWprxoXDQORa7FgOFW30xsUHSLmcLo4nYEo9Ck0bCgK6cldImq-uMQPDAEf6d9J1gwuuWW90r3wriGS0GU39KpdNv0Hx2gCfq9K2-p-OTEL_P3spopv6uHlMoCEyqhNNwsVagCJ_WgVgF6goArLBAaepM2Q1YC83rOmiDoQENE8UHTxxNPtklC4boo2G28oe6x_OGCRop-QtDW1dScG4J4vZDClNfxw/3sw/nQfrrJsrTUGEXtvfiiPjiQ/h0/DVLwScsTEqM_a-eSGE2oBs-Wpy67Zp-vMnZ2y2mxDJU)
Here's what Dr. King's son, Martin Luther King III, said about Kyrsten Sinema last year when she sided with Republicans to doom voting rights legislation: "History will remember Sen. Sinema unkindly. While Sen. Sinema remains stubborn in her ‘optimism,’ Black and Brown Americans are losing their right to vote. She’s siding with the legacy of Bull Connor and George Wallace instead of the legacy of my father and all those who fought to make real our democracy.” The right to vote is sacred, and it's under attack. Kyrsten Sinema has stood on the wrong side of protecting it. Arizonans - and all Americans -- deserve better. [**Please chip in to keep our work going >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcFaPhWsIDdanmCdGMfh4tdD3tfbo8r9uZkJDj6n_w1yMH7lSf1OpyY-8G8wzkcDvQi_5pm2qJZ6lJKlTTwb4q3C6ylZcFN19wevJuPJXof-RF-uS4ii8vwKRXh4wsmCfNva0zfITneP4LgdJXh5AqIG6BvtqU5s2CNncn5ZAS8_Vl50lAE2YqS9L5Rq5L_9a8Nc3fem-rwgfLDJ4G0vv4Unn0h9mK0EU7SZ56RXxS-1YzxAeIhnuRIVGLyGnkqXV8uIcRr_Uk2qWI4dm7Z-Ucug/3sw/nQfrrJsrTUGEXtvfiiPjiQ/h1/-GdJdiRwlW1irjYX01Sup9uKrATXQ9OTChfogDdHzlU)
[MAKE A CONTRIBUTION](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcFaPhWsIDdanmCdGMfh4tdOXEP9balqscD4S64-L0LsnuVUJZu5IXjGc9Q0ttVnHNV9QMcPtgBbCgdhvvY0HnEX47ynt-LPpUOKG2sRJbDjU3nmVYMawXg4aEUMT-94Xn15Skxd82aRbUoHi9xUWtjA51l8zkYxUD8_TwxPFmL647EcJn0uaKRmZuM0UjWxari8YJjCSJnsGVFAYgxSrPNnIMtJQZIkQto1rUYLzaAGi4aVKk8xdAVHak_RWIuX0Sw3fvhudzvkn56Q2PFyeSgA/3sw/nQfrrJsrTUGEXtvfiiPjiQ/h2/CnjdM1OptpkCcJneJ5mddO7VdMVrygpPg3U27XSGKhc) Thanks for all your help,

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: before tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Tomorrow morning, I will be sworn in as Pennsylvania's next Governor and officially take on the responsibility of leading our Commonwealth into a bright, inclusive, and prosperous future.

Derek, Tomorrow morning, I will be sworn in as Pennsylvania's next Governor and officially take on the responsibility of leading our Commonwealth into a bright, inclusive, and prosperous future. But tonight, Derek, I simply need to say thank you. Thank you for standing with me as we’ve fought to defend democracy, protect our freedom, and build an economy that gives everybody a shot. Thank you for getting off the sidelines and getting in the game. Whether you volunteered your time, donated a few hard-earned dollars, spread the word on social media, or simply cast your ballot for me and Austin, your contribution mattered and it made a real difference. Thank you for tolerating the frequent emails from our campaign, and for taking time out of your day to learn about all that we stood for. Thank you, Derek, for being a part of this incredible team. On November 8, 2022, Pennsylvanians said loud and clear that here in our Commonwealth, we value our rights. We value our freedoms. We value our democracy. And we value opportunity, for every single person, no matter what you look like, where you come from, who you pray to, or who you love. Winning the election was only the beginning of our work together. Thanks to you and every single person who helped power this movement to victory, we have the opportunity to put those fundamental values into action and move our Commonwealth forward. There will be so much more to say tomorrow, but for tonight, Derek, I just want you to know how grateful I am for you. Sincerely, Josh Shapiro
_Governor-Elect_

clean_body: Tomorrow morning, I will be sworn in as Pennsylvania's next Governor and officially take on the responsibility of leading our Commonwealth into a bright, inclusive, and prosperous future. Derek, Tomorrow morning, I will be sworn in as Pennsylvania's next Governor and officially take on the responsibility of leading our Commonwealth into a bright, inclusive, and prosperous future. But tonight, Derek, I simply need to say thank you. Thank you for standing with me as we’ve fought to defend democracy, protect our freedom, and build an economy that gives everybody a shot. Thank you for getting off the sidelines and getting in the game. Whether you volunteered your time, donated a few hard-earned dollars, spread the word on social media, or simply cast your ballot for me and Austin, your contribution mattered and it made a real difference. Thank you for tolerating the frequent emails from our campaign, and for taking time out of your day to learn about all that we stood for. Thank you, Derek, for being a part of this incredible team. On November 8, 2022, Pennsylvanians said loud and clear that here in our Commonwealth, we value our rights. We value our freedoms. We value our democracy. And we value opportunity, for every single person, no matter what you look like, where you come from, who you pray to, or who you love. Winning the election was only the beginning of our work together. Thanks to you and every single person who helped power this movement to victory, we have the opportunity to put those fundamental values into action and move our Commonwealth forward. There will be so much more to say tomorrow, but for tonight, Derek, I just want you to know how grateful I am for you. Sincerely, Josh Shapiro Governor-Elect | | | = Text JOSH to 32210 By participating, you agree to the for recurring autodialed marketing messages from Josh Shapiro to the phone number you provide. name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Open border extremism
body:
Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point:

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlo6c0i0gc4cnis7qmh5dsfb23adeg0l5lohtvdo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg6epj2c1h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I'll get straight to the point:

I'm writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden's open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z51q9t6ea6lskj848o1ubvmf763jals4b5977ucg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg6epj2c1h2bs)**

It's critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media's deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation's history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump 's term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden's immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden's "policies" have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2ov5kcqu5e5285ah2jto6hbhmqdtukg0s7i6o00_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg6epj2c1h2bs)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zddiemsejo4nffr3dk792jutbajajemlqstuq4q0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg6epj2c1h2bs)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqapc1mqd01rt9ojpns2ivli58q3b5ieoptcgit0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg6epj2c1h2bs)
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zuusjgs4it0c72avtdkj033te6e9t9hgvm16crco).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd15pnvtet2de57g732qeni96l49a89n7bckp72g_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7cpie0pr6c9g649fg)

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Open border extremism
body:
Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point:

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0mkrejhe87nqt098fsheogljgdl3tv46071gcf8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg6epj4clh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I'll get straight to the point:

I'm writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden's open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo8ljlrmc6rbmmjtuufihg9askd759l6jor1b540_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg6epj4clh2bs)**

It's critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media's deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation's history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump 's term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden's immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden's "policies" have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdj5tt58205b6hdq3sckkl4on5d55vslquvvff0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg6epj4clh2bs)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zulv70u0b7p92mge9db0vrulhoa01317lop7hhng_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg6epj4clh2bs)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zid3a321tuc49hsn41hdggcv3m9h8v3j9223rsd8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg6epj4clh2bs)
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Fighting for the lives of the unborn
body:
From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic le
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zasoo7pivqbu51lrbj3dnp7oiqolp8t4ecjvfsg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg61p37cjh2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z55qcdlbojcsm9i25u2q5d6r1n94ftg8e22l9lao_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg61p37cjh2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfn6mcn739vsfjh1m0b5e41i6s4bkp0n0vqcf1tg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg61p37cjh2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are you concerned about Biden’s open border extremism?
body:
I’m writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden’s open border extremism

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e44a6fc0e5b4c2f9d4368568310ed1c&_e=xPxrZo5TmMDPA7Dbi1wS0Ux_mdzJQPHd6Kx39MPyRNa4HSW-q4eSpwyyqokYP5XJfdFiXtz6bxD5HentC4T7EfOj3LwpYvRAHnI_991k8cp_5FY0vrPbCuVu7UbiNvphct-El0nofx4Ne4gtoOCvdDXJKJ5kZ_M6n9SGc8BKcuOBZq651azIBlXKVeqiroNjdQsh_REeBMczmY1MUK4mUp35Y3h8s3oauwnrgcRYwfLL9GsBNUwT2xGEcKjG9oKsS5xMN5h4zoK1M_lcWFI1M-i32fFdnBykO_yrBo6G5p6uft-zNSjtC8F0Ns2I6b86jYXvhl66wYx8_DliD1Bjzk6JtCgUACJWgElHWmdjfLCzbB_8Le3oygdrNIDFPvuI)

Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I'll get straight to the point:

I'm writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden's open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e44a6fc0e5b4c2f9d4368568310ed1c&_e=xPxrZo5TmMDPA7Dbi1wS0Ux_mdzJQPHd6Kx39MPyRNa4HSW-q4eSpwyyqokYP5XJfdFiXtz6bxD5HentC4T7EfOj3LwpYvRAHnI_991k8cp_5FY0vrPbCuVu7UbiNvphct-El0nofx4Ne4gtoOCvdDXJKJ5kZ_M6n9SGc8BKcuOBZq651azIBlXKVeqiroNjdQsh_REeBMczmY1MUK4mUp35Y3h8s3oauwnrgcRYwfJJXGPMbWRomY-QHAELy6km1S_vWl2RugbsDyAyjYfjT6bC3GfxL7fw2Kqh-ghPn83KuUjdQh3O9GRVWVdzp2q2YFCl92-RYviQwnslHY9CYMBwA6LRCCm6wwH7zLsiwHNuXB7wCmQReTe2Q43NEVFz)**

It's critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media's deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation's history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump 's term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden's immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden's "policies" have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e44a6fc0e5b4c2f9d4368568310ed1c&_e=xPxrZo5TmMDPA7Dbi1wS0Ux_mdzJQPHd6Kx39MPyRNa4HSW-q4eSpwyyqokYP5XJfdFiXtz6bxD5HentC4T7EfOj3LwpYvRAHnI_991k8cp_5FY0vrPbCuVu7UbiNvphct-El0nofx4Ne4gtoOCvdDXJKJ5kZ_M6n9SGc8BKcuOBZq651azIBlXKVeqiroNjdQsh_REeBMczmY1MUK4mUp35Y3h8s3oauwnrgcRYwfKHOytkIHjl-1qk1rXVT2l0fHVTyOwRa9K52JaSUkLZU8cV2ehY2PRT1br_O6C5JPUDQY8AlC1-QzZDmGC36h6WWZo6Vc5rN88GlVkSIcZixfMXadH2xpu1TNKD7Cnb7-rXDatw9iWb_DgwKoRNZL2A)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e44a6fc0e5b4c2f9d4368568310ed1c&_e=xPxrZo5TmMDPA7Dbi1wS0Ux_mdzJQPHd6Kx39MPyRNa4HSW-q4eSpwyyqokYP5XJfdFiXtz6bxD5HentC4T7EfOj3LwpYvRAHnI_991k8cp_5FY0vrPbCuVu7UbiNvphct-El0nofx4Ne4gtoOCvdDXJKJ5kZ_M6n9SGc8BKcuOBZq651azIBlXKVeqiroNjdQsh_REeBMczmY1MUK4mUp35Y3h8s3oauwnrgcRYwfL-c9q1szUZZEXDwScbU_ei52aFBwYsN9lnYtgyySPKpgMOaWGF8_awAkBiwTkZVBdtk4Mx8MqD5mPKSYE0d_Tkn4Am7Is0MahXkcH-Uyv-zL-coRAaLmBo_7vz5oFlkzoQfbAugWbeimo1TW0IHkWO)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e44a6fc0e5b4c2f9d4368568310ed1c&_e=xPxrZo5TmMDPA7Dbi1wS0Ux_mdzJQPHd6Kx39MPyRNa4HSW-q4eSpwyyqokYP5XJfdFiXtz6bxD5HentC4T7EfOj3LwpYvRAHnI_991k8cp_5FY0vrPbCuVu7UbiNvphct-El0nofx4Ne4gtoOCvdDXJKJ5kZ_M6n9SGc8BKcuOBZq651azIBlXKVeqiroNjdQsh_REeBMczmY1MUK4mUp35Y3h8s3oauwnrgcRYwfI_z8vMgSN6Bo6WfMchGXr98URhWbHRsKvNJ_uGtv2qNiWaER0CZGe6vwJkNIMMT7mzQrvLmSFFvBitND3y6BlbrlTBIh4b4xVYfRWDno9_AjuIjJETW1tn7qrfxkFRDmyIAYeT-6I9MXstkSIABT_o)

name: American Briefing
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbgvrvo29o13u0lvbl0b8fmmel69slf5epmetq18_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg69pr5cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z40joekdjc8a2a7lgpborhdah1ghsfcfftm5onio_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg69pr5cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmsiidkr3o2dbj665vcf6bhteh603lecghv3hrf8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg69pr5cth2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Briefing, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanbriefing.com/prefs/9z2zqgt2bhhss3s8h5rtg5ad92mae1pcan34apgv188).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztlia8k2uikhg7ot9dqlqfc5ipvruqf58tredgq8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7cpie0p77cljm49fg)

name: VADEMS
subject: Dr. King’s legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
We stand on the shoulders of giants — none more so than those of the Reverend Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.

Today presents us with the opportunity to reflect on the liberties that Dr. King and so many dedicated their lives to giving us.

As we see a new generation join those who marched with Dr. King and those who fought for the right to marry the person they love and secure the right to bodily autonomy, the work still continues. These new leaders seek to honor his legacy by making lasting, meaningful change to this nation that carries so much promise.

With the rights that so many of us hold dear threatened across the nation and here in our Commonwealth, we are reminded of Dr. King’s grace, passion, and righteousness in the face of hatred and bigotry. And it steels in us the fire needed to protect the rights of all Americans, and continue to push this nation forward toward a more perfect union.

VADEMS

| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8YxHbQeOIDiD8dy6JBsbjmdO397U_Bcbmdn0VA63gGtwR4q0wtcC8TUD13ukXi8LUHwK6jS3sBMfhBzSyqZTuFrY7BLmza-HDiXCNYYiN1QtrZJ8PZctyQ-hxXon0OkAJMegUEixRojTOdvGh4mvuVc2V8vpgS107clbA1pX9PkwHEG_ANYqgi09bSNa7Zjr5CS8oKjIryHALNT9297OdvZPoQ0HbK2JpSCd2n7HvR3vIeYUErqn1Gmi-MihHPS24tb0kYAg-xBZJhQWBtC1q4ezZck082xNjTIRxedN2v2x9do5a_cvoxt8tkn2-0EwRw/3sw/7IiTMDF1SHCLGymNoMu8kA/h0/GLb3esm5prt46_PD0wNfGJHYj5LI0e_HlTODXpVrRhU)
| | Peter, we are guided by the words of Dr. King and his mission for equality every day. Today, on Martin Luther King Jr. Day, we are reminded why we do what we do — because, Peter, injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere.

Recently, white supremacy and attacks on our democracy from elected “leaders” have been at an all-time high. That is why we are on a mission to elect Black progressive champions at all levels of government across the country. We are working to combat hate by electing leaders who will represent _all_ Americans.

Even in the face of bigotry, we have never and will never waiver in our mission to create a government that is representative of the people it serves. The Collective PAC works every day to create the country Dr. King envisioned — and we couldn’t be more grateful to have you standing with us.

Thank you for being a part of our mission,

The Collective PAC

* * *

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iQjwIvKCNDXuGp0ewJysplJaGGjzESfR4zk6zR37ocyRuLjtf2eCcCIbjDlITBADgjZmgajDfn4YwLGbyIAog7LOPpeho7yqneItzUBsDdoC1gFRnbyqOLomKt62EILP2aerS7QkEOK-vqd9h-2Avm71dd47LIBGlbsW6wB5vgpTRTAieuhQaiXz3nwVb84o1isPEftXfMXIrfNuB-MXgjSD8oxRR4RN0zSs7Au5a2BkKF4npw4TZ6_TgQAUpSGzSt7KNEJPRh7xsaEYlZJ9zuDz95WsEQRieyoz_H4BwrtYvVbPnBBsYv3eUresEzQnjg/3sw/7IiTMDF1SHCLGymNoMu8kA/h1/6ebpahNn5hXkwvWfl4aAnDtnEJuQL9NouG7OlHk3hJ0) | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.
---

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: A new conservative movement
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win!
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqmjdc7odt0dtvo7gndpvsugfg9vpm7ev2qio9ig_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg69p77c3h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win!_ **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrbtncbkbmu884iu72ien5nsplfrq22smu2kba40_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg69p77c3h2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbsijduvnqk269ar0tn5t07dftp1qt929b8alcmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg69p77c3h2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zibb05uvtba6n3o7nvei3kjbfvh73qob5aus5c60_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg69p77c3h2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1r1uqctfscjlv37hacp37lm88f37fauhklnps48_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg69p77c3h2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9abjb3mlj13tr8ah0kq16hud19lhkej59gatah0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg69p77c3h2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7292epg162oiuh4ipkrglml7ascpbk0kbp0knfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg69p77c3h2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z57q0b4mq2a6qk39egsstiii3d45pvq82i1ge610_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg69p77c3h2bs)
---
| | [Get my book ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl0c45lqfd33hhv11847sdiclkuuu8vr7au9ddmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cjg69p77c3h2bs)
---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2zh5alr8ecn22199b96dspjtq2phntlbt5avtm7gg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp6u0v1p3f0nsp2l2ql0mstbua2dieo522596aug_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7cpie0p74stge49fg)

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Higher Education Opinion Survey
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2df534b9ad994c31a06646cde2d0f22a&_e=mf82ftM_p5AyyUDkttdMK4YL5GT8hzAlCk4P1iuE586Wj_dPnQoscYIKLbBfVMTK2mJiALnD7MdNCtjIZ7bqv_BvMQWSsXPOaIzTfJKMEHNUZyxolcO70AFRGiKZ_RaroeLdvikGJthAwXo9d_1gvMc7nYy55G_AxezeAzhEGOQTd_hMhiHdpwj80Ieqm4JQopVaqT-livcsJX89_I9-kD8r0r5lXfSUTeXYCcWfNiSO61AhnpVgiK9yaQdxzb2RXbpJcelwmXX4qZtnXf5bbznAd_R6ItyXBnmaiBhBT5uhP2Zc4f0rRTtyxzzrLWQdcSzwWb7L2U1hgtw_WgqXQRLWXMH0AiKLKCWJl7DVhKkikQv7Pf6rcFG5xqfBSQoU)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2df534b9ad994c31a06646cde2d0f22a&_e=mf82ftM_p5AyyUDkttdMK4YL5GT8hzAlCk4P1iuE586Wj_dPnQoscYIKLbBfVMTK2mJiALnD7MdNCtjIZ7bqv_BvMQWSsXPOaIzTfJKMEHNUZyxolcO70AFRGiKZ_RaroeLdvikGJthAwXo9d_1gvMc7nYy55G_AxezeAzhEGOQTd_hMhiHdpwj80Ieqm4JQopVaqT-livcsJX89_I9-kD8r0r5lXfSUTeXYCcWfNiQIlfn2ofmT9ZA8BBia1aacmMZuAulz2aqQGkeVvLqHh7-k5NQY6gY4EbNujuRPauEhd3XDRcRZuq7cUCpeJQFpaJgb6kHoJ1aWWqQR5liqTLF5ydkqKDvnrKWHNB45yf7r96WwYZwB5A11R3V3mNhW) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2df534b9ad994c31a06646cde2d0f22a&_e=mf82ftM_p5AyyUDkttdMK4YL5GT8hzAlCk4P1iuE586Wj_dPnQoscYIKLbBfVMTK2mJiALnD7MdNCtjIZ7bqv_BvMQWSsXPOaIzTfJKMEHNUZyxolcO70AFRGiKZ_RaroeLdvikGJthAwXo9d_1gvMc7nYy55G_AxezeAzhEGOQTd_hMhiHdpwj80Ieqm4JQopVaqT-livcsJX89_I9-kD8r0r5lXfSUTeXYCcWfNiS-xxY8fUN618Kvfp7B29hmliP013iT2Z78u1o5pJGYJiAQwAvgFKIEG3Wj40Na_mByXapt01fozppWTjsjEftv0h6sIyF11T1bNF59W7VmBRuWMdlBU4J__bTv6LagBbJWgbHUCeL2R9J_xBUyHYlg) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---
